Workflow.Name: End To End Freight Claims Revised
Workflow.Description: This flow automatically denies or approves freight claims based on predetermined logic.
Workflow.Outputs: {"schema":{"properties":{"filePath":{"default":"","description":"Path of the file","format":null,"title":"filePath","type":"string","value":null},"amount":{"default":"","description":"Amount of claims looked at today","format":null,"title":"amount","type":"string","value":null},"exceptionCount":{"default":"","description":"","format":null,"title":"exceptionCount","type":"number","value":null}},"type":"object"}}
Workflow.Definition:
"@@ConnectionString: ''
@@Type: 'Local'
@@DesktopType: 'local'
@@DisplayName: 'Local computer'
IMPORT 'controlRepo.appmask' AS appmask
IMPORT 'imageRepo.imgrepo' AS imgrepo
@SENSITIVE: []
@OUTPUT filePath : { 'Description': 'Path of the file', 'FriendlyName': 'filePath', 'Type': 'String' } 
@OUTPUT amount : { 'Description': 'Amount of claims looked at today', 'FriendlyName': 'amount', 'Type': 'String' } 
@OUTPUT exceptionCount : { 'Description': '', 'FriendlyName': 'exceptionCount', 'Type': 'Numeric' } 
CALL GetExcelData
# Query SAP HANA for one of each claim id available
Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=BadFruitcakeDec25;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=E185869;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=E185869;PWD=BadFruitcakeDec25;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA

SELECT 
 EXT_KEY,
 EXT_REF,
 SALES_DIVISION_C,
 SALES_ORDER_NO,
 SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C,
 INVOICE_NUM,
 CUSTOMER_NUM,
 FLOORING_CATEGORY,
 FIN_CUSTDISP_AMT
 FROM (
 SELECT 
 c.EXT_KEY,
 c.EXT_REF,
 c.SALES_DIVISION_C,
 c.SALES_ORDER_NO,
 c.SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C,
 c.INVOICE_NUM,
 c.CUSTOMER_NUM,
 c.FLOORING_CATEGORY,
 u.FIN_CUSTDISP_AMT,
 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
 PARTITION BY c.EXT_REF
 ORDER BY c.SALES_ORDER_NO DESC
 ) AS rn
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Reporting.Finance/MHK_FI_CUSTOMER_CLAIMS_HC\" AS c
 LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"SCMG_T_CASE_ATTR\" AS s 
 ON c.\"CASE_GUID\" = s.\"CASE_GUID\" 
 LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"UDMCASEATTR00\" AS u 
 ON c.\"CASE_GUID\" = u.\"CASE_GUID\"
 WHERE 
 (
 c.\"FIN_KUNNR\" NOT IN (
\'0025024366\', \'0025024359\', \'0025024371\', \'0025024361\', \'0025024367\', 
\'0025024369\', \'0025024365\', \'0025024357\', \'0025024360\', \'0025024370\', 
\'0025024372\', \'0025024362\', \'0025024355\', \'0025024364\', \'0025024358\', 
\'0010211945\', \'0025024368\', \'0025024356\', \'0010419213\', \'0010422002\', 
\'10419213\', \'10422002\', \'10419541\', \'00101419541\', \'0010409288\', 
\'0010619009\', \'0010700668\', \'0010619002\', \'0010100668\', \'0010619000\', 
\'0010509289\', \'0010619003\', \'10619000\', \'10700668\', \'10700668\', 
\'10409288\', \'10100668\', \'0010513614\', \'0010210014\', \'0010429028\', 
\'0010522012\', \'0010399864\', \'0010413614\', \'0025012999\', \'0010414828\', 
\'0025045443\', \'0025013002\', \'0025013001\', \'0025013003\', \'0025013000\', 
\'0025013004\', \'0025013005\', \'0025013006\', \'0010536617\', \'0010436617\', 
\'0010522012\', \'10513614\', \'10210014\', \'10436617\', \'10399864\', 
\'10522012\', \'10413614\', \'0010101718\', \'0010422953\', \'0010409607\', 
\'0010430300\', \'10422953\', \'10430300\', \'0010519000\', \'0010519008\', 
\'0010419003\', \'0010519001\', \'0010519017\', \'0010519005\', \'0010519003\', 
\'0010258191\', \'0010419002\', \'0010519004\', \'0010519002\', \'0010419001\', 
\'0010159922\', \'0010110666\', \'0010419000\', \'0010519014\', \'10101503\', 
\'10519003\', \'10519000\', \'10519005\', \'10519004\', \'10110666\', \'10519017\', 
\'10519001\', \'10419001\', \'10519008\', \'10419003\', \'0010519013\', 
\'10519001\', \'10419000\', \'0010519016\', \'10519016\', \'10101404\', \'0010101404\', \'53908\'
 )
AND LEFT(u.\"ZZTMINVOICE\", 3) <> \'10-\'
 )
AND u.\"ZZPROD_CLASS\" NOT IN (\'SA\')
AND (c.\"CLAIM_TYPE_CD_S4\" IN (\'50\') -- claim type is freight
OR s.\"REASON_CODE\" IN (\'FT\', \'FT1\'))
AND s.\"STAT_ORDERNO\" IN (10) -- status is not approved or closed
--AND c.\"SALES_DIVISION_C\" IN (\'81-MOHAWK RESIDENTIAL\') -- making sure it is residential
--AND c.\"SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C\" IN (\'R_RETAIL\', \'R_BUILDER\')
AND c.\"FLOORING_CATEGORY\" IN (\'B-BROADLOOM\', \'C-CARPET TILE\')
--AND c.\"EXT_REF\" IN ( \'DM1000216312\')
AND c.\"CUSTOMER_NUM\" NOT LIKE \'%%10410590\' -- pause all claims on this customre number
)
WHERE rn = 1;''' Timeout: 400 Result=> QueryResult
ON ERROR

END

 )
--AND u.\"ZZPROD_CLASS\" NOT IN (\'SA\')
AND (c.\"CLAIM_TYPE_CD_S4\" IN (\'50\') -- claim type is freight
OR s.\"REASON_CODE\" IN (\'FT\', \'FT1\'))
AND s.\"STAT_ORDERNO\" IN (10) -- status is not approved or closed
--AND c.\"SALES_DIVISION_C\" IN (\'81-MOHAWK RESIDENTIAL\') -- making sure it is residential
--AND c.\"SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C\" IN (\'R_RETAIL\', \'R_BUILDER\')

--AND c.\"EXT_REF\" = \'DM1000216312\'
AND c.\"CUSTOMER_NUM\" NOT LIKE \'%%10410590\' 
)
WHERE rn = 1;''' Timeout: 400 Result=> OutOfScopeClaims
ON ERROR

END

DISABLE Database.Close Connection: HANAConnection
# Initialize lists that will store details about each claim
CALL InitializeVariables
# Loop through every row in the results from the query, and query cams to get the corresponding shipping methods and the cams numbers
CALL QueryCams
CALL QueryCamsOutOfScope
# On HANA, run a query that gets the rates for each invoice
CALL GetRates
SET AccountPrices TO $'''%''%'''
DISABLE CALL C4CVerification
CALL CheckOutOfScopeClaims
CALL PopulateSQL2
DISABLE CALL PopulateSQL
CALL Deny
CALL Approve
CALL GenerateReport
WAIT 2
FUNCTION InitializeVariables GLOBAL
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> OutOfScopeClaimIDs
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> OutOfScopeExceptions
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> NoCamsOrderNumbers
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> NoCamsInvoices
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> NoCamsAccountNumbers
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> NoCamsCaseIDs
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> NoCamsClaimIDs
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> NoCamsChannels
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> NoCamsProductTypes
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> SalesOrderNumbers
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> Invoices
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> SalesChannels
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> accountNumbers
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> CaseIDs
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> productTypes
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> ClaimIDs
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> ShipVia
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> origins
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> amountsCharged
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> actualRates
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> errors
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> shouldBeApproved
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> shouldBeDenied
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> returnPrices
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> notes
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> CamsOrders
 # Condition values and amounts will ONLY be used for truckloads, so we can check if those two values are the same. If they are, then throw an exception.
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> conditionValues
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> amounts
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> exceptions
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> shipLocations
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> status
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> ShipVia
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> codesChecked
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> SalesOrg
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> DistChannel
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> Division
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> Incoterms
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> Incoterms1
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> PriceSegments
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> FreightCharged
 SET PickUpLocations TO $'''CPU, CWC, N/A, GCP, CUD, GBP, GNP, IVP, THP, UGP, BSC0, CLP0, DNC0, NJC0, FLU0, HCU0, CPH0, DPU0, IWC0, ICP0, INP0, BPU0, PWC0, KSP0, LVP0, ME10, STP0, MWC0, NAP0, CHU0, OGP0, OPU0, OCU0, ORU0, PPU0, PNP0, PTP0, PHU0, RPU0, SCP0, FPU0, SYS0, TPU0, UTP0, WIP0, MCP0'''
 SET permittedProductTypes TO $'''B-BROADLOOM, C-CARPET TILE'''
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> disputedAmounts
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION QueryCams GLOBAL
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=IBMDASQL.DataSource.1;Password=Mohawk19;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=RPA0029;Data Source=Mohawk1''' Connection=> SQLConnection
 # Populate the RPA sql table with all the claims seen, and the updated dates
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Driver={SQL Server}; Server=CCHGSQLP120LSTN; Database=MOHAWKRPA; UID=MohawkRPA; PWD=XnWMtmD794''' Connection=> RPASQL
 DateTime.GetCurrentDateTime.Local DateTimeFormat: DateTime.DateTimeFormat.DateAndTime CurrentDateTime=> curTime
 LOOP FOREACH Order IN QueryResult
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''USE [MOHAWKRPA];

INSERT INTO [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsSeen] (
 [OrderNumber],
 [Invoice],
 [Channel],
 [AccountNumber],
 [ClaimId],
 [CaseId],
 [TimeProcessed]
)
VALUES (
 \'%Order['SALES_ORDER_NO']%\',
 \'%Order['INVOICE_NUM']%\',
 \'%Order['SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C']%\',
 \'%Order['CUSTOMER_NUM']%\',
 \'%Order['EXT_REF']%\',
 \'%Order['EXT_KEY']%\',
 \'%curTime%\'
);''' Timeout: 30
 SET SAPNO TO Order['SALES_ORDER_NO']
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: SQLConnection Statement: $'''SELECT

 DISTINCT(o1ord#) as CAMSOrder, 

 o1line as CAMSLine, 

 O1PO#3 as SAPOrder, 

 O1NORD as SAPLine,

 O1MS10 as SAPDeliveryOrder,
 
 O1SVIA as ShipVia,
 
 O1SWHS as Warehouse

FROM cams.opp010
WHERE O1PO#3 IN (\'%SAPNO%\')
AND O1OTYP <> \'T\'
union

SELECT

 DISTINCT(o1ord#) as CAMSOrder, 

 o1line as CAMSLine, 

 O1PO#3 as SAPOrder, 

 O1NORD as SAPLine,

 O1MS10 as SAPDeliveryOrder,
 
 O1SVIA as ShipVia,
 
 O1SWHS as Warehouse

FROM cams.opp010s
WHERE O1PO#3 IN (\'%SAPNO%\')
AND O1OTYP <> \'T\'
LIMIT 10''' Timeout: 30 Result=> QueryResult2
 # If we got nothing from CAMS, then we add the OrderNumber, claim number, CaseId and Invoice number to their respective lists
 IF QueryResult2.RowsCount = 0 THEN
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C'] List: NoCamsChannels
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_REF'] List: NoCamsClaimIDs
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: SAPNO List: NoCamsOrderNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['INVOICE_NUM'] List: NoCamsInvoices
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['CUSTOMER_NUM'] List: NoCamsAccountNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['FLOORING_CATEGORY'] List: NoCamsProductTypes
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_KEY'] List: NoCamsCaseIDs
 ELSE
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: SAPNO List: SalesOrderNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C'] List: SalesChannels
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_REF'] List: ClaimIDs
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['INVOICE_NUM'] List: Invoices
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['CUSTOMER_NUM'] List: accountNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['FLOORING_CATEGORY'] List: productTypes
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_KEY'] List: CaseIDs
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['SALES_DIVISION_C'] List: Division
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: 0 List: disputedAmounts
 LOOP FOREACH camno IN QueryResult2
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['CAMSORDER'] List: CamsOrders
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['SHIPVIA'] List: ShipVia
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['WAREHOUSE'] List: origins
 # Just get the first row in the query, and exit early
 EXIT LOOP
 END
 END
 END
 Database.Close Connection: RPASQL
 Database.Close Connection: SQLConnection
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION GetRates GLOBAL
 SET SQLError TO $'''%''%'''
 DISABLE Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=185222@Ccsd;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=N277093;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=N277093;PWD=185222@Ccsd;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=BadFruitcakeDec25;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=E185869;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=E185869;PWD=BadFruitcakeDec25;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
 LOOP loopIndex FROM 0 TO Invoices.Count - 1 STEP 1
 SET errorMessage TO $'''%''%'''
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA
SELECT DISTINCT
 d1.BOLNR,
 i2.AUBEL AS SalesOrder,
 i2.AUPOS AS SalesOrderItem,
 details.SPART AS Division,
 details.INCO1 AS IncoTerms,
 details.INCO2_L AS IncoTerms1,
 details.KONDA AS PriceGroup,
 COALESCE(p_zfst.KWERT, 0) AS ZFSTFreightCharge,
 COALESCE(p_zmft.KBETR, 0) AS ZMFTFreightCharge,
 COALESCE(p_zlgc.KWERT, 0) AS ZLGCFreightCharge,
 COALESCE(p_zfsm.KWERT, 0) AS ZFSMFreightCharge,
 
 -- Combined Freight: ZFRT + ZFST + ZDRT
 COALESCE(p_freight.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zfst.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zdrt.KWERT, 0) AS TotalFreightAmountStandard,
 
 COALESCE(p_zmft.KBETR, 0) AS ZMFTFreight,
 COALESCE(p_zfst.KBETR, 0) AS ZFST_Price,
 COALESCE(p_zfsm.KBETR, 0) AS ZFSM_Price,
 COALESCE(p_zdrt.KWERT, 0) AS DropFees,
 COALESCE(p_zlgc.KWERT, 0) AS LiftGateCharge,
 COALESCE(p_zftl.KBETR, 0) AS ZFTLCharge,
 COALESCE(p_zftl.KWERT, 0) AS ZFTL
 
FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRK\" AS i1
INNER JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\" AS i2
 ON i1.VBELN = i2.VBELN
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_LIKP\" AS d1
 ON i2.VGBEL = d1.VBELN
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBAP\" AS o2
 ON i2.AUBEL = o2.VBELN AND i2.AUPOS = o2.POSNR
 
-- Pricing Condition Joins
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_freight
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_freight.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_freight.KPOSN AND p_freight.KSCHL = \'ZFRT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfst
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfst.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfst.KPOSN AND p_zfst.KSCHL = \'ZFST\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zdrt
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zdrt.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zdrt.KPOSN AND p_zdrt.KSCHL = \'ZDRT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_po
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_po.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_po.KPOSN AND p_po.KSCHL = \'ZFCH\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zmft
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zmft.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zmft.KPOSN AND p_zmft.KSCHL = \'ZMFT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zlgc
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zlgc.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zlgc.KPOSN AND p_zlgc.KSCHL = \'ZLGC\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zftl
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zftl.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zftl.KPOSN AND p_zftl.KSCHL = \'ZFTL\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfsm
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfsm.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfsm.KPOSN AND p_zfsm.KSCHL = \'ZFSM\'
 

 
LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"VBRK\" AS details ON i1.\"VBELN\" = details.\"VBELN\"
WHERE i1.VBELN = %Invoices[loopIndex]%
AND i2.POSNR = (
 SELECT MIN(POSNR)
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\"
 WHERE VBELN = i1.VBELN
);''' Timeout: 30 Result=> invoicequery
 # If we are a truckload, then get the ZFTL charge, but if not then get the zfst price
 IF ShipVia[loopIndex] = $'''TKL''' THEN
 DISABLE IF invoicequery[0]['ZFTLCHARGE'] = invoicequery[0]['ZFTL'] THEN
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''The condition value and amount are the same'''
 DISABLE END
 # The variables conditionvalue and amount are for truckloads to keep track of the condition value and the amount, and there will be a check in the truckload subflow to see if they are the same. if they are, then we throw an exception and exit the subflow
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZFTLCHARGE'] List: conditionValues
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZFTL'] List: amounts
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZFTLCHARGE'] List: amountsCharged
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: $'''ZFTL''' List: codesChecked
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['INCOTERMS'] List: Incoterms
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['INCOTERMS1'] List: Incoterms1
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['PRICEGROUP'] List: PriceSegments
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZMFTFREIGHTCHARGE'] List: FreightCharged
 ELSE IF StartsWith(ShipVia[loopIndex], $'''UP''', True) THEN
 SET invoice TO invoices[loopIndex]
 CALL FindCodeManually
 SET invoice TO 0
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: $'''ZPFA''' List: codesChecked
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['INCOTERMS'] List: Incoterms
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['INCOTERMS1'] List: Incoterms1
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['PRICEGROUP'] List: PriceSegments
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZMFTFREIGHTCHARGE'] List: FreightCharged
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZMFTFREIGHT'] List: conditionValues
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZMFTFREIGHT'] List: amounts
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: amountCharged List: amountsCharged
 SET amountCharged TO 0
 ELSE
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZFSMFREIGHTCHARGE'] List: conditionValues
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZFSTFREIGHTCHARGE'] List: amounts
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['INCOTERMS'] List: Incoterms
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['INCOTERMS1'] List: Incoterms1
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['PRICEGROUP'] List: PriceSegments
 # If we don't have a ZFST code, then check for drop fees and liftgate, then add the respective code checked to the codesChecked list
 IF invoicequery[0]['ZFST_PRICE'] = 0 THEN
 # If we don't have it drop fees, then just assign it to the lift gate
 IF invoicequery[0]['DROPFEES'] = 0 THEN
 # LIFT GATE
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['LIFTGATECHARGE'] List: amountsCharged
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZLGCFREIGHTCHARGE'] List: FreightCharged
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: $'''ZLGC''' List: codesChecked
 ELSE
 # DROP FEES
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: 0 List: FreightCharged
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['DROPFEES'] List: amountsCharged
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: $'''ZDRT''' List: codesChecked
 END
 ELSE
 IF invoicequery[0]['ZFSM_PRICE'] = 0 THEN
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZFST_PRICE'] List: amountsCharged
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZFSTFREIGHTCHARGE'] List: FreightCharged
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: $'''ZFST''' List: codesChecked
 ELSE
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZFSM_PRICE'] List: amountsCharged
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: invoicequery[0]['ZFSTFREIGHTCHARGE'] List: FreightCharged
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: $'''ZFSM''' List: codesChecked
 END
 END
 END
 DISABLE Display.ShowMessageDialog.ShowMessage Title: $'''TEST''' Message: $'''Added to lists. New list: %MPG%''' Icon: Display.Icon.None Buttons: Display.Buttons.OK DefaultButton: Display.DefaultButton.Button1 IsTopMost: False
 END
 CALL SAP_Login
 # Now loop from 0 to the current thing, and if we have a truckload, go to truckload to collect the locations and check, but if we don't go to not truckload
 DISABLE Excel.LaunchExcel.LaunchAndOpenUnderExistingProcess Path: $'''C:\\Users\\G113600\\Downloads\\Freight Price Sheet.xlsm''' Visible: True ReadOnly: False UseMachineLocale: False Instance=> DailyAccountPrices
 DISABLE Excel.ReadFromExcel.ReadAllCells Instance: DailyAccountPrices FirstLineIsHeader: False GetCellContentsMode: Excel.GetCellContentsMode.FormattedTextValues RangeValue=> AccountPrices

 Excel.LaunchExcel.LaunchAndOpenUnderExistingProcess Path: $'''C:\\Users\\G113600\\Downloads\\Freight Pricing Automation Team.xlsx''' Visible: True ReadOnly: False UseMachineLocale: False Instance=> DailyAccountPrices

 Excel.CloseExcel.Close Instance: DailyAccountPrices
 LOOP index FROM 0 TO Invoices.Count - 1 STEP 1
 DISABLE IF IsNotEmpty(exceptionMessage) THEN
 DISABLE GOTO 'SKIP SUBFLOW'
 DISABLE END
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''%''%'''
 SET errorMessage TO $'''%''%'''
 SET shipLocation TO $'''%''%'''
 SET SalesOrderNo TO SalesOrderNumbers[index]
 SET amountCharged TO amountsCharged[index]
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET returnPrice TO 0
 SET actualRate TO 0
 SET note TO $'''%''%'''
 DISABLE IF NotContains($'''C-CARPET TILE, B-BROADLOOM''', productTypes[index], False) THEN
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Not broadloom or carpet tile, out of scope'''
 DISABLE GOTO SKIP
 DISABLE END
 IF ShipVia[index] = $'''TKL''' THEN
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Truckload, currently in progress'''
 CALL Truckload
 ELSE
 CALL 'Not Truckload'
 END
 DISABLE IF Contains(Division[index], $'''82-MOHAWK COMMERCIAL''', False) THEN
 DISABLE IF NotContains(note, $'''Approved, since they picked up from the Mill, they should be returned all the money charged''', False) THEN
 DISABLE IF IsEmpty(exceptionMessage) THEN
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Commercial claim, in development'''
 DISABLE GOTO SKIP
 DISABLE END
 DISABLE END
 DISABLE END
 LABEL SKIP
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: errorMessage List: errors
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: exceptionMessage List: exceptions
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: note List: notes
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: curApproved List: shouldBeApproved
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: curDenied List: shouldBeDenied
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: returnPrice List: returnPrices
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: shipLocation List: shipLocations
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: actualRate List: actualRates
 # This VBScript goes back so we are back at the home screen
 Scripting.RunVBScript.RunVBScript VBScriptCode: $'''If Not IsObject(application) Then

FUNCTION Truckload GLOBAL
 IF amountCharged = 0 THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''ZFTL not available in invoice'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 # check if they were charged ZFST
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA
SELECT DISTINCT
 d1.BOLNR,
 i2.AUBEL AS SalesOrder,
 i2.AUPOS AS SalesOrderItem,
 details.SPART AS Division,
 details.INCO1 AS IncoTerms,
 details.INCO2_L AS IncoTerms1,
 details.KONDA AS PriceGroup,
 COALESCE(p_zfst.KWERT, 0) AS ZFSTFreightCharge,
 COALESCE(p_zmft.KBETR, 0) AS ZMFTFreightCharge,
 COALESCE(p_zlgc.KWERT, 0) AS ZLGCFreightCharge,
 COALESCE(p_zfsm.KWERT, 0) AS ZFSMFreightCharge,
 
 -- Combined Freight: ZFRT + ZFST + ZDRT
 COALESCE(p_freight.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zfst.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zdrt.KWERT, 0) AS TotalFreightAmountStandard,
 
 COALESCE(p_zmft.KBETR, 0) AS ZMFTFreight,
 COALESCE(p_zfst.KBETR, 0) AS ZFST_Price,
 COALESCE(p_zdrt.KWERT, 0) AS DropFees,
 COALESCE(p_zlgc.KWERT, 0) AS LiftGateCharge,
 COALESCE(p_zftl.KBETR, 0) AS ZFTLCharge,
 COALESCE(p_zftl.KWERT, 0) AS ZFTL
 
FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRK\" AS i1
INNER JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\" AS i2
 ON i1.VBELN = i2.VBELN
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_LIKP\" AS d1
 ON i2.VGBEL = d1.VBELN
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBAP\" AS o2
 ON i2.AUBEL = o2.VBELN AND i2.AUPOS = o2.POSNR
 
-- Pricing Condition Joins
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_freight
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_freight.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_freight.KPOSN AND p_freight.KSCHL = \'ZFRT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfst
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfst.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfst.KPOSN AND p_zfst.KSCHL = \'ZFST\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zdrt
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zdrt.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zdrt.KPOSN AND p_zdrt.KSCHL = \'ZDRT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_po
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_po.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_po.KPOSN AND p_po.KSCHL = \'ZFCH\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zmft
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zmft.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zmft.KPOSN AND p_zmft.KSCHL = \'ZMFT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zlgc
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zlgc.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zlgc.KPOSN AND p_zlgc.KSCHL = \'ZLGC\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zftl
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zftl.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zftl.KPOSN AND p_zftl.KSCHL = \'ZFTL\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfsm
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfsm.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfsm.KPOSN AND p_zfsm.KSCHL = \'ZFSM\'
 

 
LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"VBRK\" AS details ON i1.\"VBELN\" = details.\"VBELN\"
WHERE i1.VBELN = %Invoices[index]%
AND i2.POSNR = (
 SELECT MIN(POSNR)
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\"
 WHERE VBELN = i1.VBELN
);''' Timeout: 30 Result=> invoicequery
 IF invoicequery[0]['ZFSMFREIGHTCHARGE'] > 0 THEN
 SET codesChecked[index] TO $'''ZFSM'''
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged freight on top of the truckload fee'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 # If ZFSM is double of ZFST, then we know that they were charged double
 SET tklAmt TO amounts[index]
 SET tklCondVal TO conditionValues[index]
 IF tklAmt = tklCondVal THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''SAP Database error, contact developer'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END

wscript.echo a''' ScriptOutput=> shipCity ScriptError=> enterSalesNoError
 Text.Trim Text: enterSalesNoError TrimOption: Text.TrimOption.Both TrimmedText=> enterSalesNoError
 # If there is an error, catch it, add it to the errors list, and exit the subflow
 IF IsNotEmpty(enterSalesNoError) THEN
 SET errorMessage TO $'''VBScript Error looking for the address textbox: %enterSalesNoError%'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 Text.Trim Text: shipState TrimOption: Text.TrimOption.Both TrimmedText=> shipState
 Text.Trim Text: shipCity TrimOption: Text.TrimOption.Both TrimmedText=> shipCity
 SET shipLocation TO $'''%shipCity% %shipState% %zipCode%'''
 WAIT 0.5
 IF NotContains($'''AND, CAD''', origins[index], False) THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Origin is not CAD or AND, still working on figuring out other codes'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 Text.GetSubtext.GetSubtextFromStartTo Text: zipCode NumberOfChars: 5 Subtext=> zipCode
 Variables.FilterDataTable DataTable: TruckloadPrices FilterParameters: { ^['RULE', 'COLUMN', 'OPERATOR', 'VALUE'], [$'''''', $'''Column1''', $'''Contains''', $'''NGA'''], [$'''And''', $'''Column4''', $'''Contains''', zipCode] } MatchCase: True FilteredDataTable=> CurTruckloadRate
 IF CurTruckloadRate.RowsCount = 0 THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''No match found for zipcode %zipCode%, origin %origins[index]%'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 ELSE IF curTruckloadRate.RowsCount > 1 THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Multiple matches found for zipcode %zipCode%, origin %origins[index]%'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 SET actualRate TO curTruckloadRate[0]['Column5']
 IF actualRate >= amountCharged THEN
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, because the amount they were charged was less than or equal to what they should\'ve been charged'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged more than what they should\'ve been charged'''
 END
 DISABLE IF SalesChannels[index] = $'''R_RETAIL''' THEN
 DISABLE CALL 'Truckload Retail'
 DISABLE ELSE
 DISABLE CALL 'Truckload Builder'
 DISABLE END
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION 'Not Truckload' GLOBAL
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Driver={SQL Server}; Server=CCHGSQLP120LSTN; Database=MOHAWKRPA; UID=MohawkRPA; PWD=XnWMtmD794''' Connection=> RPASQL
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''SELECT *
 FROM [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[DropFeesEndToEndFreight]
 WHERE caseid = %CaseIDs[index]%
 ''' Timeout: 30 Result=> Seen
 Database.Close Connection: RPASQL
 # If the code checked is ZDRT, then it is out of scope
 IF codesChecked[index] = $'''ZDRT''' THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Drop fees, out of scope'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 IF Contains(PickUpLocations, ShipVia[index], False) THEN
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Customer Pickup exception'''
 CALL 'Customer Pickup'
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 Text.GetSubtext.GetSubtextFromStartTo Text: ShipVia[index] NumberOfChars: 2 Subtext=> Subtext
 # If the first two characters are UP, it is UPS
 IF Contains(Subtext, $'''UP''', True) THEN
 CALL UPS
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''UPS exception'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 # If the amountCharged is 0, then throw an exception saying that there's none of the codes.
 IF amountCharged = 0 THEN
 SET codesChecked[index] TO $'''%''%'''
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''No freight codes found on invoice'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 # If we have a liftgate, call validate lift gate
 IF codesChecked[index] = $'''ZLGC''' THEN
 CALL ValidateLiftGate
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Lift gate, out of scope'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 IF IsEmpty(Incoterms1[index]) THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Failed to get variable keys from HANA'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 # If they were charged double
 IF conditionValues[index] = (2 * FreightCharged[index]) THEN
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged double of what they should\'ve been charged'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 IF Seen.RowsCount > 0 THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Handled by Drop Fees Bot'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 Text.GetSubtext.GetSubtextFrom Text: accountNumbers[index] CharacterPosition: 0 Subtext=> accountNo
 # We have ZFST, so go into the excel sheet and get the rate
 IF productTypes[index] = $'''B-BROADLOOM''' THEN
 CALL Broadloom
 ELSE IF StartsWith(productTypes[index], $'''C-''', True) THEN
 CALL CarpetTile
 ELSE
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Not broadloom or carpet tile, out of scope'''
 END
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION 'Truckload Retail' GLOBAL
 LOOP FOREACH locationRow IN retailRates
 SET curCity TO locationRow['Column2']
 Text.Trim Text: curCity TrimOption: Text.TrimOption.Both TrimmedText=> curCity
 SET curState TO locationRow['Column3']
 Text.Trim Text: curState TrimOption: Text.TrimOption.Both TrimmedText=> curState
 # If you find the city and the state, then set "actualRate" to the variable, and exit loop. if we get to the end of the loop and we don't find the location, then we know it is not in the table. We add to the error table, then exit the subflow
 IF Contains(curState, shipState, False) THEN
 IF Contains(curCity, shipCity, False) THEN
 SET actualRate TO locationRow['Column7']
 EXIT LOOP
 END
 END
 END
 # If the actual rate is empty, we know we didnt find the location. if it is not, check what we were charged vs what we should've been charged
 IF actualRate <> 0 THEN
 Text.RecognizeEntitiesInText Text: amountCharged Mode: Text.RecognizerMode.Number Language: Text.RecognizerLanguage.English RecognizedEntities=> amountCharged
 Text.RecognizeEntitiesInText Text: actualRate Mode: Text.RecognizerMode.Number Language: Text.RecognizerLanguage.English RecognizedEntities=> actualRate
 SET amountCharged TO amountCharged[0]['Value']
 SET actualRate TO actualRate[0]['Value']
 IF actualRate > amountCharged THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''They were charged %amountCharged% which is less than %actualRate%'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 IF actualRate <> amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Approved because the amount charged is different from the actual rate'''
 SET returnPrice TO amountCharged - actualRate
 EXIT FUNCTION
 ELSE
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied because the actual rate is the same as the amount charged'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 ELSE
 # Location wasn't found, so add to the exception table.
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Location %shipLocation% not found in document'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION 'Truckload Builder' GLOBAL
 DISABLE Excel.LaunchExcel.LaunchAndOpenUnderExistingProcess Path: $'''C:\\Users\\G113600\\Downloads\\BMF TRUCKLOAD RATES.xlsx''' Visible: True ReadOnly: False UseMachineLocale: False Instance=> BuilderExcel
 DISABLE Excel.ReadFromExcel.ReadAllCells Instance: BuilderExcel FirstLineIsHeader: False GetCellContentsMode: Excel.GetCellContentsMode.FormattedTextValues RangeValue=> builderRates
 DISABLE Excel.CloseExcel.Close Instance: BuilderExcel
 DISABLE SET shipCity TO $'''Marietta'''
 DISABLE SET shipState TO $'''GA'''
 DISABLE SET amountCharged TO 126
 LOOP FOREACH locationRow IN builderRates
 SET curCity TO locationRow['Column1']
 Text.Trim Text: curCity TrimOption: Text.TrimOption.Both TrimmedText=> curCity
 SET curState TO locationRow['Column2']
 Text.Trim Text: curState TrimOption: Text.TrimOption.Both TrimmedText=> curState
 # If you find the city and the state, then set "actualRate" to the variable, and exit loop. if we get to the end of the loop and we don't find the location, then we know it is not in the table. We add to the error table, then exit the subflow
 IF Contains(curState, shipState, False) THEN
 IF Contains(curCity, shipCity, False) THEN
 SET actualRate TO locationRow['Column3']
 EXIT LOOP
 END
 END
 END
 # If the actual rate is empty, we know we didnt find the location. if it is not, check what we were charged vs what we should've been charged
 IF actualRate <> 0 THEN
 IF actualRate > amountCharged THEN
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged less than they should\'ve been charged'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 IF actualRate <> amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Approved because the amount charged is different from the actual rate'''
 DISABLE SET returnPrice TO amountCharged - actualRate
 EXIT FUNCTION
 ELSE
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged at the right amount'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 ELSE
 # Location wasn't found,check to see if the price was over $100
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Location %shipLocation% not found in table'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION C4CVerification GLOBAL
 Text.JoinText.JoinWithCustomDelimiter List: accountNumbers CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' Result=> accountNumbers
 Text.JoinText.JoinWithCustomDelimiter List: SalesOrderNumbers CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' Result=> SalesOrderNumbers

 Scripting.RunPowershellScript.RunScript Script: $'''python \"C:\\Users\\G113600\\Downloads\\webautomate.py\" \"%accountNumbers%\" \"%SalesOrderNumbers%\" \"%productTypes%\" \"%amountsCharged%\" \"%ShipVia%\" \"%shouldBeApproved%\" \"%shouldBeDenied%\" \"%returnPrices%\" \"%errors%\" \"%actualRates%\" \"%exceptions%\" \"%codesChecked%\" \"%notes%\"''' ScriptOutput=> PowershellOutput ScriptError=> pythonError
 DISABLE Display.ShowMessageDialog.ShowMessage Title: $'''Powershell Test''' Message: PowershellOutput Icon: Display.Icon.None Buttons: Display.Buttons.OK DefaultButton: Display.DefaultButton.Button1 IsTopMost: False
 DISABLE Display.ShowMessageDialog.ShowMessage Title: $'''TEST''' Message: pythonError Icon: Display.Icon.None Buttons: Display.Buttons.OK DefaultButton: Display.DefaultButton.Button1 IsTopMost: False
 Text.SplitText.Split Text: PowershellOutput StandardDelimiter: Text.StandardDelimiter.NewLine DelimiterTimes: 1 Result=> allLists
 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[0] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> accountNumbers
 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[1] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> SalesOrderNumbers
 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[2] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> productTypes

 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[4] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> ShipVia
 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[5] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> shouldBeApproved
 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[6] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> shouldBeDenied
 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[7] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> returnPrices
 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[8] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> errors
 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[9] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> actualRates
 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[10] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> exceptions
 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[11] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> codesChecked
 Text.SplitText.SplitWithDelimiter Text: allLists[12] CustomDelimiter: $'''||''' IsRegEx: False Result=> notes
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION PopulateSQL GLOBAL
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Driver={SQL Server}; Server=CCHGSQLP120LSTN; Database=MOHAWKRPA; UID=MohawkRPA; PWD=XnWMtmD794''' Connection=> RPASQL
 LOOP index FROM 0 TO SalesOrderNumbers.Count - 1 STEP 1
 Display.ShowMessageDialog.ShowMessageWithTimeout Title: $'''IGNORE''' Message: ClaimIDs[index] Icon: Display.Icon.None Buttons: Display.Buttons.OK DefaultButton: Display.DefaultButton.Button1 IsTopMost: False Timeout: 1
 DateTime.GetCurrentDateTime.Windows DateTimeFormat: DateTime.DateTimeFormat.DateAndTime TimeZoneLocation: DateTime.TimeZoneLocation.EasternStandardTime CurrentDateTime=> curTime
 SET note TO notes[index]
 Text.Replace Text: note TextToFind: $'''\'''' IsRegEx: False IgnoreCase: False ReplaceWith: $'''\'\'''' ActivateEscapeSequences: False Result=> note
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''SELECT *
FROM [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
WHERE TimeProcessed >= CAST(GETDATE() AS date)
 AND TimeProcessed < DATEADD(day, 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS date))
 AND ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\';''' Timeout: 30 Result=> Seen
 # If we don't find the claim in the table already, then do this.
 IF Seen.RowsCount = 0 THEN
 IF (errors[index] = '' AND exceptions[index] = '') = $'''TRUE''' THEN
 # If there is no error and no exception, then we would want to put the status as in progress -> means that we have figured out a decision for the claim. (if the claim already existed, leave everything the way it was before so that we only have the notes column updated)
 Text.ParseText.RegexParseForFirstOccurrence Text: accountNumbers[index] TextToFind: $'''\\/''' StartingPosition: 0 IgnoreCase: False OccurrencePosition=> Position
 IF Position >= 0 THEN
 EXIT Code: 0 ErrorMessage: $'''This is not a valid account number: %accountNumbers[index]%'''
 END
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''INSERT INTO [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] 
 (HasCamsOrder, OrderNumber, CamsNumber, TimeProcessed, ShipVia, AccountNumber, Error, ShipLocation, 
 ActualRate, RateCharged, Invoice, Approved, Denied, Status, CaseID, ClaimID, Notes, Channel, 
 ProductType, Exceptions, Code, FreightCharged, Seen, DisputedAmounts)
SELECT
 \'1\',
 \'%SalesOrderNumbers[index]%\',
 \'%CamsOrders[index]%\',
 \'%curTime%\',
 \'%ShipVia[index]%\',
 \'%accountNumbers[index]%\',
 \'%errors[index]%\',
 \'%shipLocations[index]%\',
 \'%actualRates[index]%\',
 \'%amountsCharged[index]%\',
 \'%Invoices[index]%\',
 \'%shouldBeApproved[index]%\',
 \'%shouldBeDenied[index]%\',
 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (
 SELECT 1
 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t 
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 )
 THEN (
 SELECT TOP 1 t.Status
 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 ORDER BY t.TimeProcessed DESC
 )
 ELSE \'In Progress\'
 END AS Status,
 \'%CaseIDs[index]%\',
 \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\',
 -- Always override Notes if record exists
 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 
 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t 
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 )
 THEN CONCAT(
 \'Claim already reviewed on \',
 CONVERT(varchar(30), (
 SELECT MIN(t.TimeProcessed) 
 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t 
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 ), 120)
 )
 ELSE \'%note%\'
 END AS Notes,
 \'%SalesChannels[index]%\',
 \'%productTypes[index]%\',
 \'%exceptions[index]%\',
 \'%codesChecked[index]%\',
 \'%FreightCharged[index]%\',
 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 
 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t 
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 ) 
 THEN 1 
 ELSE 0 
 END AS Seen,
 \'%disputedAmounts[index]%\';
''' Timeout: 30
 ELSE
 # If there is only an error (if the claim already existed, leave everything the way it was before so that we only have the notes column updated)
 IF errors[index] = $'''%''%''' THEN
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''INSERT INTO [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] 
 (HasCamsOrder, OrderNumber, CamsNumber, TimeProcessed, ShipVia, AccountNumber, Error, ShipLocation, 
 ActualRate, RateCharged, Invoice, Approved, Denied, Status, CaseID, ClaimID, Notes, Channel, 
 ProductType, Exceptions, Code, FreightCharged, Seen, DisputedAmounts)
SELECT
 \'1\',
 \'%SalesOrderNumbers[index]%\',
 \'%CamsOrders[index]%\',
 \'%curTime%\',
 \'%ShipVia[index]%\',
 \'%accountNumbers[index]%\',
 \'%errors[index]%\',

 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (

 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t 
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 )
 THEN (
 SELECT TOP 1 t.Status
 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 ORDER BY t.TimeProcessed DESC
 )
 ELSE \'Exception\'
 END AS Status,
 \'%CaseIDs[index]%\',
 \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\',
 -- Always override Notes if record exists
 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 
 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t 
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 )
 THEN CONCAT(
 \'Claim already reviewed on \',
 CONVERT(varchar(30), (
 SELECT MIN(t.TimeProcessed) 
 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t 
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 ), 120)
 )
 ELSE \'%note%\'
 END AS Notes,
 \'%SalesChannels[index]%\',
 \'%productTypes[index]%\',
 \'%exceptions[index]%\',
 \'%codesChecked[index]%\',
 \'%FreightCharged[index]%\',
 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 
 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t 
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 ) 
 THEN 1 
 ELSE 0 
 END AS Seen,
 \'%disputedAmounts[index]%\';
''' Timeout: 30
 ELSE
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''INSERT INTO [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] 
 (HasCamsOrder, OrderNumber, CamsNumber, TimeProcessed, ShipVia, AccountNumber, Error, ShipLocation, 
 ActualRate, RateCharged, Invoice, Approved, Denied, Status, CaseID, ClaimID, Notes, Channel, 
 ProductType, Exceptions, Code, FreightCharged, Seen, DisputedAmounts)
SELECT
 \'1\',
 \'%SalesOrderNumbers[index]%\',
 \'%CamsOrders[index]%\',
 \'%curTime%\',
 \'%ShipVia[index]%\',
 \'%accountNumbers[index]%\',
 \'%errors[index]%\',
 \'%shipLocations[index]%\',
 \'%actualRates[index]%\',
 \'%amountsCharged[index]%\',

 \'%shouldBeApproved[index]%\',
 \'%shouldBeDenied[index]%\',
 \'Failed\',
 \'%CaseIDs[index]%\',
 \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\',
 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t 
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 )
 THEN (
 SELECT CONCAT(\'claim already reviewed on \', 
 CONVERT(varchar(30), MIN(t.TimeProcessed), 120))
 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 )
 ELSE \'%note%\'
 END AS Notes,
 \'%SalesChannels[index]%\',
 \'%productTypes[index]%\',
 \'%exceptions[index]%\',
 \'%codesChecked[index]%\',
 \'%FreightCharged[index]%\',
 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (

 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%ClaimIDs[index]%\'
 ) 
 THEN 1 ELSE 0

 \'%disputedAmounts[index]%\';''' Timeout: 30

 END
 # Add the ones with no CAMS accounts
 LOOP index FROM 0 TO NoCamsAccountNumbers.Count - 1 STEP 1
 DateTime.GetCurrentDateTime.Windows DateTimeFormat: DateTime.DateTimeFormat.DateAndTime TimeZoneLocation: DateTime.TimeZoneLocation.EasternStandardTime CurrentDateTime=> curTime
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''INSERT INTO [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
 (HasCamsOrder, OrderNumber, TimeProcessed, Invoice, Status, CaseID, ClaimID, Channel,

 \'NULL\',

 \'\',
 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (

 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%NoCamsClaimIDs[index]%\'
 )
 THEN (
 SELECT CONCAT(\'claim already reviewed on \',

 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%NoCamsClaimIDs[index]%\'
 )
 ELSE \'Debit Memo, out of scope\'
 END AS Notes,
 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%NoCamsClaimIDs[index]%\'
 ) 
 THEN 1 ELSE 0 
 END AS Seen;
''' Timeout: 30
 END
 LOOP index FROM 0 TO OutOfScopeClaims.RowsCount - 1 STEP 1
 DateTime.GetCurrentDateTime.Windows DateTimeFormat: DateTime.DateTimeFormat.DateAndTime TimeZoneLocation: DateTime.TimeZoneLocation.EasternStandardTime CurrentDateTime=> curTime
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''SELECT *
FROM [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
WHERE TimeProcessed >= CAST(GETDATE() AS date)
 AND TimeProcessed < DATEADD(day, 1, CAST(GETDATE() AS date))
 AND ClaimID = \'%OutOfScopeClaims[index][1]%\';''' Timeout: 30 Result=> Seen
 IF Seen.RowsCount = 0 THEN
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''INSERT INTO [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
 (HasCamsOrder, OrderNumber, TimeProcessed, Invoice, Status, CaseID, ClaimID, Channel, 
 ProductType, AccountNumber, ShipVia, Exceptions, Error, Notes, Seen)
SELECT
 \'0\',
 \'%OutOfScopeClaims[index][3]%\',
 \'%curTime%\',
 \'%OutOfScopeClaims[index][5]%\',
 \'Exception\',
 \'%OutOfScopeClaims[index][0]%\',
 \'%OutOfScopeClaims[index][1]%\',
 \'%OutOfScopeClaims[index][4]%\',
 \'%OutOfScopeClaims[index][7]%\',
 \'%OutOfScopeClaims[index][6]%\',
 \'NULL\',
 \'%OutOfScopeExceptions[index]%\',
 \'\',
 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%OutOfScopeClaims[index][1]%\'
 )
 THEN (
 SELECT CONCAT(\'claim already reviewed on \', 
 CONVERT(varchar(30), MIN(t.TimeProcessed), 120))
 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%OutOfScopeClaims[index][1]%\'
 )
 ELSE \'Out of scope\'
 END AS Notes,
 CASE 
 WHEN EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM [dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports] t
 WHERE t.ClaimID = \'%OutOfScopeClaims[index][1]%\'
 ) 
 THEN 1 ELSE 0 
 END AS Seen;
''' Timeout: 30
 END
 END
 Database.Close Connection: RPASQL
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION ValidateLiftGate GLOBAL
 DISABLE Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=185222@Ccsd;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=N277093;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=N277093;PWD=185222@Ccsd;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=BadFruitcakeDec25;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=E185869;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=E185869;PWD=BadFruitcakeDec25;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA
SELECT ZLGATE_PJACK FROM
\"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"VBAK\"
WHERE VBELN = \'%SalesOrderNumbers[index]%\';''' Timeout: 400 Result=> LiftGateResult
 ON ERROR

 END
 SET selectedLiftGate TO LiftGateResult[0][0]
 Text.Trim Text: selectedLiftGate TrimOption: Text.TrimOption.Both TrimmedText=> selectedLiftGate
 IF IsEmpty(selectedLiftGate) THEN
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved because lift gate was not selected, but was charged for lift gate'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied because lift gate was selected'''
 END
 DISABLE Database.Close Connection: HANAConnection
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION GenerateReport GLOBAL
 DateTime.GetCurrentDateTime.Windows DateTimeFormat: DateTime.DateTimeFormat.DateAndTime TimeZoneLocation: DateTime.TimeZoneLocation.EasternStandardTime CurrentDateTime=> curTime
 IF skip = 1 THEN
 GOTO Empty
 END
 # Generates an email with a list of account numbers and claims that don't have matching freight information
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Driver={SQL Server}; Server=CCHGSQLP120LSTN; Database=MOHAWKRPA; UID=MohawkRPA; PWD=XnWMtmD794''' Connection=> RPASQL
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''SELECT DISTINCT(
	[ClaimID]),
	[CaseID],
	[OrderNumber] AS SalesOrderNumber,
	[AccountNumber],
	[Invoice],
	[Channel],
	[ShipVia],
	[RateCharged],
	[ActualRate] AS C4CRate,
	CASE
		WHEN [Status] = \'In Progress\' THEN \'Made decision, but not changed in SAP\'
		WHEN [Status] = \'Complete\' THEN \'Made changes in SAP\'
		ELSE \'Exception\'
	END AS Status,
	CASE
		WHEN [Approved] = 1 THEN \'Approved\'
		WHEN [Denied] = 1 THEN \'Denied\'
		ELSE \'Neither\'
	END AS ApprovedOrDenied,
	[Notes] As Reason,
	CASE
		WHEN [Exceptions] = \'\' THEN \'No Exception\'
		ELSE [Exceptions]
	END AS Exceptions,
	CASE
		WHEN [Error] = \'\' THEN \'No Error\'
		ELSE [Error]
	END AS Errors
	FROM [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
	WHERE TimeProcessed BETWEEN \'%curTime.Year%-%curTime.Month%-%curTime.Day% 00:00:00\' AND \'%curTime.Year%-%curTime.Month%-%curTime.Day% 23:59:59\';''' Timeout: 300 Result=> Report
 Database.Close Connection: RPASQL
 DISABLE Display.ShowMessageDialog.ShowMessage Title: $'''curDate''' Message: $'''Year: %curTime.Year%
Month: %curTime.Month%
Day: %curTime.Day%''' Icon: Display.Icon.None Buttons: Display.Buttons.OK DefaultButton: Display.DefaultButton.Button1 IsTopMost: False
 SET amount TO Report.RowsCount
 IF Report.RowsCount > 0 THEN
 Variables.FilterDataTable DataTable: Report FilterParameters: { ^['RULE', 'COLUMN', 'OPERATOR', 'VALUE'], [$'''And''', $'''Status''', $'''Contains''', $'''changes in'''] } MatchCase: True FilteredDataTable=> exceptionCount
 SET exceptionCount TO exceptionCount.RowsCount
 Excel.LaunchExcel.LaunchAndOpenUnderExistingProcess Path: $'''C:\\Users\\G113600\\Downloads\\FreightClaimsReport\\DailyFreightReport.xlsx''' Visible: True ReadOnly: False UseMachineLocale: False Instance=> ExcelInstance
 Excel.WriteToExcel.WriteCell Instance: ExcelInstance Value: Report Column: $'''A''' Row: 2
 Excel.SaveExcel.SaveAs Instance: ExcelInstance DocumentFormat: Excel.ExcelFormat.OpenXmlWorkbook DocumentPath: $'''C:\\Users\\G113600\\OneDrive - Mohawk Industries\\GreatsFiles\\DailyFreightReport.xlsx'''
 Excel.CloseExcel.Close Instance: ExcelInstance
 SET filePath TO $'''\\GreatsFiles\\DailyFreightReport%curTime.Year%%curTime.Month%%curTime.Day%'''
 DISABLE Outlook.Launch Instance=> OutlookInstance
 DISABLE Outlook.SendEmailThroughOutlook.SendEmail Instance: OutlookInstance Account: $'''rparobot_driverhoursindustrysafe@mohawkind.com''' SendTo: $'''great_abhieyighan@mohawkind.com''' Subject: $'''Daily Freight Claims Report - %curTime% ''' Body: $'''<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
 <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">
 <title>Daily Claims Report</title>
 <style>
 body {
 font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
 color: #333333;
 background-color: #f4f4f4;
 margin: 0;
 padding: 0;
 }
 .email-container {
 max-width: 600px;
 margin: 30px auto;
 background-color: #ffffff;

 border-radius: 6px;
 box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
 }
 .header {
 font-size: 18px;
 font-weight: bold;
 color: #0056b3;
 margin-bottom: 15px;
 }
 .message {
 font-size: 16px;
 margin-bottom: 20px;
 }
 .footer {
 font-size: 13px;
 color: #888888;
 text-align: center;
 border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
 padding-top: 15px;
 }
 </style>
</head>
<body>

 <!-- Message block: Update dynamically -->

 </div>

 <div class=\"footer\">
 If there are any questions, please contact great_abhieyighan@mohawkind.com
 </div>

</html>''' IsBodyHtml: True IsDraft: False Attachments: $'''C:\\Users\\G113600\\Downloads\\FreightClaimsReport\\DailyFreightReport%curTime.Year%%curTime.Month%%curTime.Day%.xlsx'''
 DISABLE WAIT 10
 DISABLE Outlook.Close Instance: OutlookInstance
 ELSE
 DISABLE Variables.FilterDataTable DataTable: Report FilterParameters: { ^['RULE', 'COLUMN', 'OPERATOR', 'VALUE'], [$'''And''', $'''Exceptions''', $'''NotContains''', $'''No Exception'''] } MatchCase: True FilteredDataTable=> exceptionCount
 DISABLE SET exceptionCount TO exceptionCount.RowsCount
 SET filePath TO $'''%''%'''
 SET exceptionCount TO 0
 LABEL Empty

 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Driver={SQL Server}; Server=CCHGSQLP120LSTN; Database=MOHAWKRPA; UID=MohawkRPA; PWD=XnWMtmD794''' Connection=> RPASQL
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''SELECT CaseID
 FROM [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
 WHERE ClaimNotes IS NULL''' Timeout: 30 Result=> QueryResult5
 Variables.RetrieveDataTableColumnIntoList DataTable: QueryResult5 ColumnNameOrIndex: $'''CaseID''' ColumnAsList=> caseIDs
 DISABLE Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=185222@CCsd;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=N277093;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=N277093;PWD=185222@Ccsd;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
 LOOP index FROM 0 TO CaseIDs.Count - 1 STEP 1
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''SELECT STRING_AGG(\"CLAIM_COMMENTS_TXT\", \' \') AS \"note\"
FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Reporting.Finance/MHK_FI_CUSTOMER_CLAIMS_HC\" p
INNER JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Reporting.Finance/MHK_FI_CUSTOMR_CLAIMS_COMMENTS_HC\" n
ON n.\"CLAIM_NUM\" = \"EXT_REF\" AND n.\"CLAIM_SEQUENCE_NUM\" = \"EXT_KEY\"
WHERE \"EXT_KEY\" = %CaseIDs[index]%''' Timeout: 30 Result=> QueryResult6
 ON ERROR

 END

SET ClaimNotes =\' %QueryResult6[0]['note']%\'
WHERE CaseID = %CaseIDs[index]%;''' Timeout: 30 Result=> QueryResult5
 ON ERROR

 END
 DISABLE IF Contains(codesChecked[index], $'''ZMFT''', True) THEN

FUNCTION Deny GLOBAL
 SET mode TO $'''Deny'''
 SET permittedClaimComponents TO $'''05, 02, 15, 16, 17'''
 DateTime.GetCurrentDateTime.Windows DateTimeFormat: DateTime.DateTimeFormat.DateAndTime TimeZoneLocation: DateTime.TimeZoneLocation.EasternStandardTime CurrentDateTime=> curTime
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Driver={SQL Server}; Server=CCHGSQLP120LSTN; Database=MOHAWKRPA; UID=MohawkRPA; PWD=XnWMtmD794''' Connection=> RPASQL
 # These are the type of components each line has that we can select
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=BadFruitcakeDec25;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=E185869;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=E185869;PWD=BadFruitcakeDec25;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''SELECT * 
 FROM [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
 WHERE [Status] = \'In Progress\' AND [Denied] = 1 AND Approved = 0
 AND [ShipVia] <> \'TKL\' 
--AND [Notes] NOT LIKE \'claim already reviewed %%\'
 AND [TimeProcessed] BETWEEN \'%curTime.Year%-%curTime.Month%-%curTime.Day% 00:00:00\' AND \'%curTime.Year%-%curTime.Month%-%curTime.Day% 23:59:59\' AND [Exceptions] = \'\' AND Error = \'\'
 --AND ClaimID <> \'DM1000222330\';''' Timeout: 30 Result=> claimsDenied
 DISABLE Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''SELECT * FROM EndToEndFreightClaimsReports
WHERE ID = 9073;''' Timeout: 30 Result=> claimsDenied
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> status
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> errors
 SET index TO 0
 # Loop through every denied claim
 LOOP FOREACH row IN claimsDenied
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> CaseIDs
 System.TerminateProcess.TerminateProcessByName ProcessName: $'''saplogon'''
 ON ERROR

 END
 WAIT 5
 CALL SAP_Login
 WAIT 5
 IF StartsWith(row['ShipVia'], $'''UP''', True) THEN
 IF row['RateCharged'] = 0 THEN
 SET internalNote TO $'''\"UPS claim.\" + vbCr + \"No quotes provided in CAMS notes\"'''
 ELSE
 SET internalNote TO $'''\"UPS Claim.\" + vbCr + \"Rate Charged - $%row['RateCharged']%\" + vbCr + \"Actual Rate - $%row['ActualRate']%\" + vbCr + \"The claim is denied because they were charged the right amount\"'''
 END
 SET customerNote TO $'''\"Hello,\" + vbCr + \"After reviewing the freight fee on this invoice, we confirmed that the correct amount was charged, as the material was shipped via UPS and the UPS rate was applied to the invoice. \" + vbCr + \"As a result, this claim will be declined\" + vbCr + vbCr + \"Thank you,\" + vbCr + \"Mohawk Claims\"'''
 ELSE
 SET internalNote TO $'''\"Rate Charged - $%row['RateCharged']%\" + vbCr + \"Actual Rate - $%row['ActualRate']%\" + vbCr + \"The claim is denied because they were charged the right amount\"'''
 IF row['RateCharged'] < row['ActualRate'] THEN
 SET customerNote TO $'''\"Hello,\" + vbCr + \"After review of the submitted information, our records indicate that the price on file is $%row['ActualRate']%, whereas the amount you were actually charged was just $%row['ActualRate']%\". + vbCr + \"Since the charged amount falls below the price currently on file, no errors related to Mohawk were detected, and as a result, this claim has been declined\" + vbCr + vbCr + \"Thank you,\" + vbCr + \"Mohawk Claims\"'''
 ELSE
 SET customerNote TO $'''\"Hello,\" + vbCr + \"After review of the submitted information, we show that the price on file rate is $%row['ActualRate']%. The amount charged of $%row['ActualRate']% shows to match the current price on file, therefore no Mohawk errors were observed, resulting in this claim being declined.\" + vbCr + vbCr + \"Thank you,\" + vbCr + \"Mohawk Claims\"'''
 END
 END
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''%''%'''
 SET errorMessage TO $'''%''%'''
 # Enter ZFIClaims
 IF StartsWith(row['ClaimID'], $'''DM''', True) THEN
 DISABLE SET errorMessage TO $'''Deduction, waiting for manual review before being processed'''
 CALL SplitDeductions
 DISABLE GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 IF IsNotEmpty(errorMessage) THEN
 GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 Scripting.RunVBScript.RunVBScript VBScriptCode: $'''If Not IsObject(application) Then

FUNCTION SAP_Login GLOBAL
 System.RunApplication.RunApplicationAndWaitToComplete ApplicationPath: $'''C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SAP\\FrontEnd\\SAPgui\\sapshcut.exe''' CommandLineArguments: $'''start -system=ps5 -client=400 -user=G137154 -pw=Calhoun12''' WindowStyle: System.ProcessWindowStyle.Normal Timeout: 60 ProcessId=> AppProcessId ExitCode=> AppExitCode

FUNCTION SQL_UpdateSuccess GLOBAL
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''update [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
set Status =\'Complete\'
where ID = \'%row['ID']%\'''' Timeout: 30
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION SQL_UpdateFail GLOBAL
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''update [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
set Error =\'%errorMessage%\', Exceptions = \'%exceptionMessage%\'
where ID = \'%row['ID']%\'''' Timeout: 30
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION 'Customer Pickup' GLOBAL
 IF StartsWith(Division[index], 82, True) THEN
 SET mode TO 82
 ELSE
 SET mode TO 81
 END
 SET pickupType TO $'''%''%'''
 # Find the matching row
 LOOP FOREACH row IN millLocations
 # If we find the matching row, jump to where we handle the matches
 IF Contains(row['Column3'], ShipVia[index], True) THEN
 SET pickupType TO $'''Mill'''
 SET CPUIncoterm1 TO row['Column2']
 GOTO 'Found Match'
 END
 END
 LOOP FOREACH row IN satelliteLocations
 # If we find the matching row, jump to where we handle the matches
 IF Contains(row['Column3'], ShipVia[index], False) THEN
 SET pickupType TO $'''Satellite'''
 SET CPUIncoterm1 TO row['Column2']
 GOTO 'Found Match'
 END
 END
 # If we make it here, then we jump to no match, which handles the exception
 GOTO 'No match'
 LABEL 'No match'
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''No match found for either satellite or mill. Ship Via: %ShipVia[index]%'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 LABEL 'Found Match'
 Text.GetSubtext.GetSubtextFrom Text: accountNumbers[index] CharacterPosition: 0 Subtext=> accountNo
 IF pickupType = $'''Mill''' THEN
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, since they picked up from the Mill, they should be returned all the money charged'''
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Should be approved, but being reviewed'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 # Filter the datatable with the incoterms and accounts and other things
 IF productTypes[index] = $'''B-BROADLOOM''' THEN
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA
WITH BUT000 AS (
	SELECT DISTINCT
		a.\"PARTNER\" AS \"BP\",
		b.\"PARTNER\" AS \"SoldTo BP\"
	FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.MasterData/MHK_BVDM_MD_BUT000\" as a
	LEFT JOIN
		\"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.MasterData/MHK_BVDM_MD_BUT000\" as b ON
		SUBSTRING(a.\"BPEXT\",1,INSTR(a.\"BPEXT\",\'.\')-1)||\'.0000\' = b.\"BPEXT\"
	WHERE 
		a.\"BPEXT\" <> \'\' AND b.\"PARTNER\" IS NOT NULL
),
 
FPS AS (	
	SELECT DISTINCT ------------------------------------------------------------------------- STANDARD TABLE - A9JU
		a.\"KNUMH\" AS \"Cond. Record\", 
		\'A9JU - Standard\' AS \"Source Table\", 
		a.\"KSCHL\" AS \"Condition Type\",
		a.\"VKORG\" AS \"Sales Organization\",
		a.\"VTWEG\" AS \"Distribution Channel\",
		a.\"SPART\" AS \"Division\",
		a.\"ZKONDA\" AS \"SoldTo BP\",
		a.\"ZKONDA\" AS \"Cust Num\", ----------------------------------------------------------- Repeats on purpose because these are standards.
		a.\"INCO1\" AS \"Incoterms\",
		a.\"INCO2_L\" AS \"Incoterms Location 1\",
		CASE -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- WAREHOUSE \'ATS\' HAS NOT YET BEEN MAPPED
			WHEN \"INCO2_L\" = \'6755\'
			THEN \'ATS\'

SELECT * 
FROM FPS
WHERE \"SoldTo BP\" = \'%accountNo%\'
AND \"Material Price Grp\" IN (\'B\')
AND \"Scale Quantity\" < 2
AND \"Division\" = \'%mode%\'
AND \"Incoterms\" = \'CLB\'
AND \"Incoterms Location 1\" = %CPUIncoterm1%
AND \"Distribution Channel\" = 80
ORDER BY
	\"Source Table\" ASC,
	\"Cond. Record\" ASC, 
	\"Scale Quantity\" ASC''' Timeout: 30 Result=> FilteredDataTable
 DISABLE Variables.FilterDataTable DataTable: AccountPrices FilterParameters: { ^['RULE', 'COLUMN', 'OPERATOR', 'VALUE'], [$'''''', $'''Column6''', $'''Contains''', 81], [$'''And''', $'''Column9''', $'''Contains''', $'''CLB'''], [$'''And''', $'''Column10''', $'''Contains''', CPUIncoterm1], [$'''And''', $'''Column13''', $'''Contains''', $'''B'''], [$'''And''', $'''Column14''', $'''LessThanOrEqual''', 1], [$'''And''', $'''Column5''', $'''Contains''', 80], [$'''And''', $'''Column8''', $'''Contains''', accountNo] } MatchCase: True FilteredDataTable=> FilteredDataTable

SELECT * 
FROM FPS
WHERE \"SoldTo BP\" = \'%priceSegments[index]%\'
AND \"Material Price Grp\" IN (\'C\')
AND \"Scale Quantity\" < 2
AND \"Division\" = \'%mode%\'
AND \"Incoterms\" = \'CLB\'
AND \"Incoterms Location 1\" = %CPUIncoterm1%
AND \"Distribution Channel\" = 80
ORDER BY
	\"Source Table\" ASC,
	\"Cond. Record\" ASC, 
	\"Scale Quantity\" ASC''' Timeout: 30 Result=> FilteredDataTable
 ELSE
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Not broadloom or carpet tile, out of scope'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 IF FilteredDataTable.RowsCount = 0 THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''No freight information on excel sheet'''
 ELSE IF FilteredDataTable.RowsCount > 1 THEN
 # If we have more than one, then throw an exception because we can't find a specific match
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''More than 1 freight information on excel sheet'''
 ELSE
 # We found the rate, then compare the two values and make a decision
 SET actualRate TO filteredDataTable[0]['RATE']
 IF actualRate >= amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged at the right amount'''
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Should be denied, but being reviewed'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged $%amountCharged% when it should\'ve been $%actualRate%'''
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Should be approved, but being reviewed'''
 END
 END
 ELSE IF FilteredDataTable.RowsCount > 1 THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''More than 1 freight information on excel sheet'''
 ELSE
 SET actualRate TO filteredDataTable[0]['RATE']
 IF actualRate = amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged at the right amount'''
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Should be denied, but being reviewed'''
 ELSE IF amountCharged < actualRate THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Should be denied, but being reviewed'''
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged less than what they should have been charged'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged $%amountCharged% when it should\'ve been $%actualRate%'''
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Should be approved, but being reviewed'''
 END
 END
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Customer Pickup Error: Found match, but next steps still being worked on'''
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION 'Test Customer Pick Up' GLOBAL
 SET pickupType TO $'''%''%'''
 # Find the matching row
 LOOP FOREACH row IN millLocations
 # If we find the matching row, jump to where we handle the matches
 IF Contains(row['Column3'], ShipVia[index], True) THEN
 SET pickupType TO $'''Mill'''
 SET CPUIncoterm1 TO row['Column2']
 GOTO 'Found Match'
 END
 END
 LOOP FOREACH row IN satelliteLocations
 # If we find the matching row, jump to where we handle the matches
 IF Contains(row['Column3'], ShipVia[index], False) THEN
 SET pickupType TO $'''Satellite'''
 SET CPUIncoterm1 TO row['Column2']
 GOTO 'Found Match'
 END
 END
 # If we make it here, then we jump to no match, which handles the exception
 GOTO 'No match'
 LABEL 'No match'
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''No match found for either satellite or mill. Ship Via: %ShipVia[index]%'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 LABEL 'Found Match'
 Text.GetSubtext.GetSubtextFrom Text: accountNumbers[index] CharacterPosition: 2 Subtext=> accountNo
 IF pickupType = $'''Mill''' THEN
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, since they picked up from the Mill, they should be returned all the money charged'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION 'General Test' GLOBAL
 Text.ToNumber Text: 332.87 Number=> TextAsNumber
 SET TextAsNumber TO 2 * 322.87
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=IBMDASQL.DataSource.1;Password=Mohawk19;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=RPA0029;Data Source=Mohawk1''' Connection=> SQLConnection
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: SQLConnection Statement: $'''SELECT DISTINCT O1SWHS AS Warehouse

 )

 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''SELECT DISTINCT
	p.KINAK AS Active,
 i1.VBELN AS InvoiceNumber,
 i2.POSNR AS InvoiceItem,
 o2.VBELN AS SalesOrder,
 o2.POSNR AS SalesOrderItem,
 details.SPART AS Division,
 details.INCO1 AS IncoTerms,
 details.INCO2_L AS IncoTerms1,
 details.KONDA AS PriceGroup,
 p.KSCHL AS ConditionType,
 p.KWERT AS ConditionValue,
 p.KBETR AS ConditionRate,
 p.KPEIN AS PricingUnit,
 p.KMEIN AS Measure
FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRK\" AS i1
INNER JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\" AS i2
 ON i1.VBELN = i2.VBELN
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBAP\" AS o2
 ON i2.AUBEL = o2.VBELN AND i2.AUPOS = o2.POSNR
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p.KNUMV
 AND o2.POSNR = p.KPOSN
LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"VBRK\" AS details
 ON i1.\"VBELN\" = details.\"VBELN\"
WHERE i1.VBELN = \'9503406478\'
AND i2.POSNR = (
 SELECT MIN(POSNR)
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\"
 WHERE VBELN = i1.VBELN
)
ORDER BY p.KSCHL;
''' Timeout: 400 Result=> QueryResult
 ON ERROR

 END

FUNCTION Broadloom GLOBAL
 IF StartsWith(Division[index], 82, True) THEN
 SET mode TO 82
 ELSE
 SET mode TO 81
 END
 # Filter the datatable with PPA, accounts, and incotermlocation1
 DISABLE Display.ShowMessageDialog.ShowMessage Title: $'''TEST''' Message: $'''%accountNo%
%Incoterms1[index]%''' Icon: Display.Icon.None Buttons: Display.Buttons.OK DefaultButton: Display.DefaultButton.Button1 IsTopMost: False ButtonPressed=> ButtonPressed
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA
WITH BUT000 AS (
	SELECT DISTINCT
		a.\"PARTNER\" AS \"BP\",
		b.\"PARTNER\" AS \"SoldTo BP\"
	FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.MasterData/MHK_BVDM_MD_BUT000\" as a
	LEFT JOIN
		\"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.MasterData/MHK_BVDM_MD_BUT000\" as b ON
		SUBSTRING(a.\"BPEXT\",1,INSTR(a.\"BPEXT\",\'.\')-1)||\'.0000\' = b.\"BPEXT\"
	WHERE 
		a.\"BPEXT\" <> \'\' AND b.\"PARTNER\" IS NOT NULL
),
 
FPS AS (	
	SELECT DISTINCT ------------------------------------------------------------------------- STANDARD TABLE - A9JU
		a.\"KNUMH\" AS \"Cond. Record\", 
		\'A9JU - Standard\' AS \"Source Table\", 
		a.\"KSCHL\" AS \"Condition Type\",
		a.\"VKORG\" AS \"Sales Organization\",
		a.\"VTWEG\" AS \"Distribution Channel\",
		a.\"SPART\" AS \"Division\",
		a.\"ZKONDA\" AS \"SoldTo BP\",
		a.\"ZKONDA\" AS \"Cust Num\", ----------------------------------------------------------- Repeats on purpose because these are standards.
		a.\"INCO1\" AS \"Incoterms\",
		a.\"INCO2_L\" AS \"Incoterms Location 1\",
		CASE -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- WAREHOUSE \'ATS\' HAS NOT YET BEEN MAPPED
			WHEN \"INCO2_L\" = \'6755\'
			THEN \'ATS\'
			ELSE LEFT(b.\"NAME1\",3) 
		END AS \"Warehouse Cd\",
		CASE -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- SATELLITE - MILL ASSIGNMENT
			WHEN a.\"INCO2_L\" IN 
				(\'6267\', \'6705\', \'6707\', \'6708\', \'6709\', \'6710\', \'6714\', \'6715\', 
				\'6717\', \'6719\', \'6721\', \'6725\', \'6726\', \'6727\', \'6728\', \'6729\', 
				\'6730\', \'6735\', \'6736\', \'6737\', \'6738\', \'6739\', \'6740\', \'6741\', 
				\'6742\', \'6745\', \'6746\', \'6748\', \'6749\', \'6756\', \'6757\', \'6758\', 
				\'6760\', \'6764\', \'6765\', \'6766\', \'6769\', \'6755\')
			THEN \'SATELLITE\'
			ELSE
				CASE 
					WHEN a.\"INCO2_L\" IN 
						(\'6211\', \'6216\', \'6221\', \'6226\', \'6231\', \'6241\', \'6521\', \'6526\')
					THEN \'MILL\'
					ELSE \'OTHER\'
				END
		END AS \"Warehouse Type\",
		a.\"KONDM\" AS \"Material Price Grp\",
		c.\"KSTBM\" AS \"Scale Quantity\",
		c.\"KBETR\" AS \"Rate\",
		\'Base Only\' AS \"Scale Type\",
		TO_DATE(a.\"DATBI\",\'YYYYMMDD\') AS \"Valid To\",
		TO_DATE(a.\"DATAB\",\'YYYYMMDD\') AS \"Valid From\"
	FROM \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"A9JU\" AS a
	LEFT JOIN 
		\"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"T001W\" AS b ON
		a.\"INCO2_L\" = b.\"WERKS\"
	LEFT JOIN 
		\"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.MasterData/MHK_BVDM_MD_KONP\" AS c ON 
		a.\"KNUMH\" = c.\"KNUMH\"
	WHERE 
		a.\"KSCHL\" IN (\'ZFST\',\'ZDRT\') AND
		TO_DATE(a.\"DATAB\",\'YYYYMMDD\') <= CURRENT_DATE AND
		TO_DATE(a.\"DATBI\",\'YYYYMMDD\') >= CURRENT_DATE AND
		a.\"KONDM\" IN (\'B\',\'C\',\'H\')
 
UNION ALL
 
	SELECT DISTINCT --------------------------------------------------------------------- SOLD-TO TABLE - A9JT
		a.\"KNUMH\" AS \"Cond. Record\", 
		\'A9JT - SOLDTO\' AS \"Source Table\", 
		a.\"KSCHL\" AS \"Condition Type\",
		a.\"VKORG\" AS \"Sales Organization\",
		a.\"VTWEG\" AS \"Distribution Channel\",
		a.\"SPART\" AS \"Division\",
		e.\"SoldTo BP\", ------------------------------------------------------------------ FROM MODIFIED BUT000 TABLE
		a.\"KUNNR\" AS \"Cust Num\",
		a.\"INCO1\" AS \"Incoterms\",
		a.\"INCO2_L\" AS \"Incoterms Location 1\",
		CASE ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- WAREHOUSE \'ATS\' HAS NOT YET BEEN MAPPED
			WHEN \"INCO2_L\" = \'6755\'
			THEN \'ATS\'
			ELSE LEFT(b.\"NAME1\",3) 
		END AS \"Warehouse Cd\",
		CASE ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- SATELLITE - MILL ASSIGNMENT
			WHEN a.\"INCO2_L\" IN 
				(\'6267\', \'6705\', \'6707\', \'6708\', \'6709\', \'6710\', \'6714\', \'6715\', 
				\'6717\', \'6719\', \'6721\', \'6725\', \'6726\', \'6727\', \'6728\', \'6729\', 
				\'6730\', \'6735\', \'6736\', \'6737\', \'6738\', \'6739\', \'6740\', \'6741\', 
				\'6742\', \'6745\', \'6746\', \'6748\', \'6749\', \'6756\', \'6757\', \'6758\', 
				\'6760\', \'6764\', \'6765\', \'6766\', \'6769\', \'6755\')
			THEN \'SATELLITE\'
			ELSE
				CASE 
					WHEN a.\"INCO2_L\" IN 
						(\'6211\', \'6216\', \'6221\', \'6226\', \'6231\', \'6241\', \'6521\', \'6526\')
					THEN \'MILL\'
					ELSE \'OTHER\'
				END
		END AS \"Warehouse Type\",
		a.\"KONDM\" AS \"Material Price Grp\",
		CASE
			WHEN c.\"KSTBM\" IS NULL
			THEN d.\"KSTBM\"
			ELSE c.\"KSTBM\"
		END AS \"Scale Quantity\",
		CASE 
			WHEN c.\"KBETR\" IS NULL
			THEN d.\"KBETR\"
			ELSE c.\"KBETR\"
		END AS \"Rate\",
		CASE
			WHEN c.\"KSTBM\" IS NULL
			THEN \'Base Only\'
			ELSE \'Scales\' 
		END AS \"Scale Type\",
		TO_DATE(a.\"DATBI\",\'YYYYMMDD\') AS \"Valid To\",
		TO_DATE(a.\"DATAB\",\'YYYYMMDD\') AS \"Valid From\"
 
	FROM \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"A9JT\" AS a
	LEFT JOIN 
		\"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"T001W\" AS b ON
		a.\"INCO2_L\" = b.\"WERKS\"
	LEFT JOIN 
		\"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.MasterData/MHK_BVDM_MD_KONM\" AS c ON 
		a.\"KNUMH\" = c.\"KNUMH\"
	LEFT JOIN 
		\"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.MasterData/MHK_BVDM_MD_KONP\" AS d ON

		TO_DATE(a.\"DATAB\",\'YYYYMMDD\') <= CURRENT_DATE AND
		TO_DATE(a.\"DATBI\",\'YYYYMMDD\') >= CURRENT_DATE
)
 
SELECT * 
FROM FPS
WHERE \"SoldTo BP\" = \'%accountNo%\'
AND \"Material Price Grp\" IN (\'B\')
--AND \"Scale Quantity\" < 2
AND \"Division\" = \'%mode%\'
AND \"Incoterms\" = \'PPA\'

SELECT * 
FROM FPS
WHERE \"SoldTo BP\" = \'%PriceSegments[index]%\'
AND \"Material Price Grp\" IN (\'B\')
AND \"Scale Quantity\" < 2
AND \"Division\" = %mode%
AND \"Incoterms\" = \'PPA\'
AND \"Incoterms Location 1\" = \'%Incoterms1[index]%\'
AND \"Distribution Channel\" = 80
ORDER BY
	\"Source Table\" ASC,
	\"Cond. Record\" ASC, 
	\"Scale Quantity\" ASC''' Timeout: 30 Result=> FilteredDataTable

 GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 DISABLE Variables.FilterDataTable DataTable: AccountPrices FilterParameters: { ^['RULE', 'COLUMN', 'OPERATOR', 'VALUE'], [$'''Or''', $'''Column6''', $'''Contains''', 81], [$'''And''', $'''Column9''', $'''Contains''', $'''PPA'''], [$'''And''', $'''Column10''', $'''Contains''', Incoterms1[index]], [$'''And''', $'''Column13''', $'''Contains''', $'''B'''], [$'''And''', $'''Column14''', $'''LessThanOrEqual''', 1], [$'''And''', $'''Column5''', $'''Contains''', 80], [$'''And''', $'''Column7''', $'''Contains''', PriceSegments[index]] } MatchCase: True FilteredDataTable=> FilteredDataTable
 IF FilteredDataTable.RowsCount = 0 THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''No freight information for account %accountNo%'''
 ELSE IF FilteredDataTable.RowsCount > 1 THEN
 # if it is more than 1, that means we have different scales, find the right scale
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA
SELECT FKLMG
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\"
 WHERE VBELN = %Invoices[index]%''' Timeout: 30 Result=> Quantity
 ON ERROR
 GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 SET Quantity TO Quantity[0][0]
 SET ActualRate TO FilteredDataTable[0]['RATE']
 LOOP FOREACH row IN FilteredDataTable
 IF row[13] <= Quantity THEN
 SET actualRate TO row['RATE']
 ELSE
 EXIT LOOP
 END
 END
 IF actualRate = amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged at the right amount'''
 ELSE IF amountCharged < actualRate THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged less than what they should have been charged'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged $%amountCharged% when it should\'ve been $%actualRate%'''
 END
 ELSE
 # We found the rate, then compare the two values and make a decision
 SET actualRate TO filteredDataTable[0]['RATE']
 IF actualRate = amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged at the right amount'''
 ELSE IF amountCharged < actualRate THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged less than what they should have been charged'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged $%amountCharged% when it should\'ve been $%actualRate%'''
 END
 END
 ELSE IF FilteredDataTable.RowsCount > 1 THEN
 # if it is more than 1, that means we have different scales, find the right scale
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA
SELECT FKLMG
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\"
 WHERE VBELN = %Invoices[index]%''' Timeout: 30 Result=> Quantity
 ON ERROR
 GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 SET Quantity TO Quantity[0][0]
 SET ActualRate TO FilteredDataTable[0]['RATE']
 LOOP FOREACH row IN FilteredDataTable
 IF row[13] <= Quantity THEN
 SET actualRate TO row['RATE']
 ELSE
 EXIT LOOP
 END
 END
 IF actualRate = amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged at the right amount'''
 ELSE IF amountCharged < actualRate THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged less than what they should have been charged'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged $%amountCharged% when it should\'ve been $%actualRate%'''
 END
 ELSE
 SET actualRate TO filteredDataTable[0]['RATE']
 IF actualRate = amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged at the right amount'''
 ELSE IF amountCharged < actualRate THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged less than what they should have been charged'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged $%amountCharged% when it should\'ve been $%actualRate%'''
 END
 END
 EXIT FUNCTION
 LABEL 'ERROR'
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Error querying for the rate'''
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION CarpetTile GLOBAL
 IF StartsWith(Division[index], 82, True) THEN
 SET mode TO 82
 ELSE
 SET mode TO 81
 END

		b.\"PARTNER\" AS \"SoldTo BP\"

		a.\"KONDM\" AS \"Material Price Grp\",
