SELECT * 
FROM FPS
WHERE \"SoldTo BP\" = \'%PriceSegments[index]%\'
AND \"Material Price Grp\" IN (\'C\')
AND \"Scale Quantity\" < 2
AND \"Division\" = %mode%
AND \"Incoterms\" = \'PPA\'
AND \"Incoterms Location 1\" = \'%Incoterms1[index]%\'
AND \"Distribution Channel\" = 80
ORDER BY
	\"Source Table\" ASC,
	\"Cond. Record\" ASC, 
	\"Scale Quantity\" ASC''' Timeout: 30 Result=> FilteredDataTable

 GOTO 'ERROR'

 DISABLE Variables.FilterDataTable DataTable: AccountPrices FilterParameters: { ^['RULE', 'COLUMN', 'OPERATOR', 'VALUE'], [$'''Or''', $'''Column6''', $'''Contains''', 81], [$'''And''', $'''Column9''', $'''Contains''', $'''PPA'''], [$'''And''', $'''Column10''', $'''Contains''', Incoterms1[index]], [$'''And''', $'''Column13''', $'''Contains''', $'''B'''], [$'''And''', $'''Column14''', $'''LessThanOrEqual''', 1], [$'''And''', $'''Column5''', $'''Contains''', 80], [$'''And''', $'''Column7''', $'''Contains''', PriceSegments[index]] } MatchCase: True FilteredDataTable=> FilteredDataTable
 IF FilteredDataTable.RowsCount = 0 THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''No freight information for account %accountNo%'''
 ELSE IF FilteredDataTable.RowsCount > 1 THEN
 # if it is more than 1, that means we have different scales, find the right scale
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA
SELECT FKLMG
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\"
 WHERE VBELN = %Invoices[index]%''' Timeout: 30 Result=> Quantity
 ON ERROR
 GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 SET Quantity TO Quantity[0][0]
 SET ActualRate TO FilteredDataTable[0]['RATE']
 LOOP FOREACH row IN FilteredDataTable
 IF row[13] <= Quantity THEN
 SET actualRate TO row['RATE']
 ELSE
 EXIT LOOP
 END
 END
 IF actualRate = amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged at the right amount'''
 ELSE IF amountCharged < actualRate THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged less than what they should have been charged'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged $%amountCharged% when it should\'ve been $%actualRate%'''
 END
 ELSE
 # We found the rate, then compare the two values and make a decision
 SET actualRate TO filteredDataTable[0]['RATE']
 IF actualRate = amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged at the right amount'''
 ELSE IF amountCharged < actualRate THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged less than what they should have been charged'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged $%amountCharged% when it should\'ve been $%actualRate%'''
 END
 END
 ELSE IF FilteredDataTable.RowsCount > 1 THEN
 # if it is more than 1, that means we have different scales, find the right scale
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA
SELECT FKLMG
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\"
 WHERE VBELN = %Invoices[index]%''' Timeout: 30 Result=> Quantity
 ON ERROR
 GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 SET Quantity TO Quantity[0][0]
 SET ActualRate TO FilteredDataTable[0]['RATE']
 LOOP FOREACH row IN FilteredDataTable
 IF row[13] <= Quantity THEN
 SET actualRate TO row['RATE']
 ELSE
 EXIT LOOP
 END
 END
 IF actualRate = amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged at the right amount'''
 ELSE IF amountCharged < actualRate THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged less than what they should have been charged'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged $%amountCharged% when it should\'ve been $%actualRate%'''
 END
 ELSE
 SET actualRate TO filteredDataTable[0]['RATE']
 IF actualRate = amountCharged THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged at the right amount'''
 ELSE IF amountCharged < actualRate THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged less than what they should have been charged'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged $%amountCharged% when it should\'ve been $%actualRate%'''
 END
 END
 EXIT FUNCTION
 LABEL 'ERROR'
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Error querying for the rate'''
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION TestTruckload GLOBAL
 # Enter the code VA03 and go to the ship location, and get it
 SET SalesOrderNo TO 5044282362
 UIAutomation.PopulateTextField.PopulateTextField TextField: appmask['Window \'SAP Easy Access\'']['Gui Ok Code Field \'okcd\''] Text: $'''Va03''' Mode: UIAutomation.PopulateTextMode.Replace ClickType: UIAutomation.PopulateMouseClickType.SingleClick
 @@source: 'Recorder'
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: '{Enter}'
 Scripting.RunVBScript.RunVBScript VBScriptCode: $'''If Not IsObject(application) Then
 Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject(\"SAPGUI\")
 Set application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
End If
If Not IsObject(connection) Then
 Set connection = application.Children(0)
End If
If Not IsObject(session) Then
 Set session = connection.Children(0)

FUNCTION Approve GLOBAL
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=BadFruitcakeDec25;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=E185869;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=E185869;PWD=BadFruitcakeDec25;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
 SET mode TO $'''Approve'''
 DISABLE Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=185222@Ccsd;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=N277093;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=N277093;PWD=185222@Ccsd;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
 DISABLE CALL SAP_Login
 # These are the type of components each line has that we can select
 SET permittedClaimComponents TO $'''05, 02, 15, 16, 17'''
 DateTime.GetCurrentDateTime.Windows DateTimeFormat: DateTime.DateTimeFormat.DateAndTime TimeZoneLocation: DateTime.TimeZoneLocation.EasternStandardTime CurrentDateTime=> curTime
 SET PickUpLocations TO $'''CPU, CWC, N/A, GCP, CUD, GBP, GNP, IVP, THP, UGP, BSC0, CLP0, DNC0, NJC0, FLU0, HCU0, CPH0, DPU0, IWC0, ICP0, INP0, BPU0, PWC0, KSP0, LVP0, ME10, STP0, MWC0, NAP0, CHU0, OGP0, OPU0, OCU0, ORU0, PPU0, PNP0, PTP0, PHU0, RPU0, SCP0, FPU0, SYS0, TPU0, UTP0, WIP0, MCP0'''
 DISABLE Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=185222@Ccsd;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=N277093;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=N277093;PWD=185222@Ccsd;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Driver={SQL Server}; Server=CCHGSQLP120LSTN; Database=MOHAWKRPA; UID=MohawkRPA; PWD=XnWMtmD794''' Connection=> RPASQL
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> status
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''SELECT * 
 FROM [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
 WHERE [Status] = \'In Progress\' AND [Approved] = 1 AND [Denied] = 0 AND [ShipVia] <> \'TKL\' 
 --AND [Notes] LIKE \'Approved, since they picked up from the Mill, they should be returned all the money charged\'
 AND [TimeProcessed] BETWEEN \'%curTime.Year%-%curTime.Month%-%curTime.Day% 00:00:00\' AND \'%curTime.Year%-%curTime.Month%-%curTime.Day% 23:59:59\' AND [Exceptions] = \'\' AND Error = \'\'
 --AND ShipVia IN (\'CPU\');''' Timeout: 30 Result=> claimsApproved
 DISABLE Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''SELECT * 
 FROM [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
 WHERE ID = 9749''' Timeout: 30 Result=> claimsApproved
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> errors
 SET index TO 0
 # Loop through every claim
 LOOP FOREACH row IN claimsApproved
 SET needsCheck TO 0
 Variables.CreateNewList List=> CaseIDs
 System.TerminateProcess.TerminateProcessByName ProcessName: $'''saplogon'''
 ON ERROR

 END
 WAIT 5
 CALL SAP_Login
 WAIT 5
 SET errorMessage TO $'''%''%'''
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''%''%'''
 IF StartsWith(row['ClaimID'], $'''DM''', True) THEN
 DISABLE SET errorMessage TO $'''Deduction, waiting for manual review before being processed'''
 CALL SplitDeductions
 END
 IF IsEmpty(errorMessage) THEN
 IF Contains(PickUpLocations, row['ShipVia'], False) THEN
 CALL 'CPU Approval'
 ELSE IF Contains(row['ProductType'], $'''S-SAMPLES''', False) THEN
 CALL 'Samples Approval'
 ELSE
 CALL 'General Approval'
 END
 END
 IF IsNotEmpty(errorMessage) THEN
 CALL SQL_UpdateFail
 END
 END
 Database.Close Connection: HANAConnection
 DISABLE Database.Close Connection: HANAConnection
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION CalculateReturnPrice GLOBAL
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''SELECT

 -- Combined Freight: ZFRT + ZFST + ZDRT
 SUM(COALESCE(p_freight.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zfsm.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zdrt.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zfch.KWERT, 0)) AS Total

 
FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRK\" AS i1
INNER JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\" AS i2
 ON i1.VBELN = i2.VBELN
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_LIKP\" AS d1
 ON i2.VGBEL = d1.VBELN
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBAP\" AS o2
 ON i2.AUBEL = o2.VBELN AND i2.AUPOS = o2.POSNR
 
-- Pricing Condition Joins
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_freight
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_freight.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_freight.KPOSN AND p_freight.KSCHL = \'ZFRT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfst
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfst.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfst.KPOSN AND p_zfst.KSCHL = \'ZFST\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zdrt
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zdrt.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zdrt.KPOSN AND p_zdrt.KSCHL = \'ZDRT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_po
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_po.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_po.KPOSN AND p_po.KSCHL = \'ZFCH\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zmft
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zmft.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zmft.KPOSN AND p_zmft.KSCHL = \'ZMFT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zlgc
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zlgc.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zlgc.KPOSN AND p_zlgc.KSCHL = \'ZLGC\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zftl
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zftl.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zftl.KPOSN AND p_zftl.KSCHL = \'ZFTL\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfsm
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfsm.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfsm.KPOSN AND p_zfsm.KSCHL = \'ZFSM\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfch
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfch.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfch.KPOSN AND p_zfch.KSCHL = \'ZFCH\'
 

LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"VBRK\" AS details ON i1.\"VBELN\" = details.\"VBELN\"
WHERE i1.VBELN = %row['Invoice']%
''' Timeout: 30 Result=> totalCharged
 SET creditAmount TO totalCharged[0]['TOTAL']
 SET amountCharged TO row['RateCharged']
 Text.ToNumber Text: amountCharged Number=> amountCharged
 SET actualRate TO row['ActualRate']
 Text.ToNumber Text: actualRate Number=> actualRate
 IF actualRate = 0 THEN
 DISABLE SET creditAmount TO totalCharged
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 SET distance TO creditAmount / amountCharged
 SET creditAmount TO distance * actualRate
 SET creditAmount TO totalCharged[0]['TOTAL'] - creditAmount
 Variables.TruncateNumber.RoundNumber Number: creditAmount DecimalPlaces: 2 Result=> creditAmount
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION 'CPU Approval' GLOBAL
 DISABLE IF row['ActualRate'] <> 0 THEN
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Order was not picked up from a mill, calculated amount differed from customer disputed amount'''
 DISABLE CALL SQL_UpdateException
 DISABLE EXIT FUNCTION
 DISABLE END
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''SELECT

 -- Combined Freight: ZFRT + ZFST + ZDRT
 SUM(COALESCE(p_freight.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zfst.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zdrt.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zfch.KWERT, 0)) AS Total

 
FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRK\" AS i1
INNER JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\" AS i2
 ON i1.VBELN = i2.VBELN
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_LIKP\" AS d1
 ON i2.VGBEL = d1.VBELN
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBAP\" AS o2
 ON i2.AUBEL = o2.VBELN AND i2.AUPOS = o2.POSNR
 
-- Pricing Condition Joins
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_freight
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_freight.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_freight.KPOSN AND p_freight.KSCHL = \'ZFRT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfst
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfst.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfst.KPOSN AND p_zfst.KSCHL = \'ZFST\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zdrt
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zdrt.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zdrt.KPOSN AND p_zdrt.KSCHL = \'ZDRT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_po
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_po.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_po.KPOSN AND p_po.KSCHL = \'ZFCH\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zmft
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zmft.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zmft.KPOSN AND p_zmft.KSCHL = \'ZMFT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zlgc
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zlgc.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zlgc.KPOSN AND p_zlgc.KSCHL = \'ZLGC\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zftl
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zftl.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zftl.KPOSN AND p_zftl.KSCHL = \'ZFTL\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfsm
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfsm.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfsm.KPOSN AND p_zfsm.KSCHL = \'ZFSM\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfch
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfch.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfch.KPOSN AND p_zfch.KSCHL = \'ZFCH\'
 

LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"VBRK\" AS details ON i1.\"VBELN\" = details.\"VBELN\"
WHERE i1.VBELN = %row['Invoice']%
''' Timeout: 30 Result=> QueryResult1
 SET creditAmount TO QueryResult1[0]['TOTAL']
 SET internalNote TO $'''\"Rate Charged - $%row['RateCharged']%\" + vbCr + \"Actual Rate - $%row['ActualRate']%\" + vbCr + \"The claim is approved because they picked up from a mill, so all the freight of $%creditAmount% should be returned.\"'''
 SET permittedClaimComponents TO $'''05, 02, 15, 16, 17'''
 SET customerNote TO $'''\"Dear Customer,\" + vbCr + \"The freight charge was applied incorrectly. We are processing the full credit to correct this error.\" + vbCr + vbCr + \"Thank you,\" + vbCr + \"Mohawk Claims\"'''
 # Enter ZFIClaims
 Scripting.RunVBScript.RunVBScript VBScriptCode: $'''If Not IsObject(application) Then
 Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject(\"SAPGUI\")
 Set application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
End If
If Not IsObject(connection) Then
 Set connection = application.Children(0)
End If
If Not IsObject(session) Then
 Set session = connection.Children(0)
End If
If IsObject(WScript) Then
 WScript.ConnectObject session, \"on\"
 WScript.ConnectObject application, \"on\"
End If
session.findById(\"wnd[0]\").resizeWorkingPane 113,25,false
session.findById(\"wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd\").text = \"zficlaims\"
session.findById(\"wnd[0]\").sendVKey 0
''' ScriptError=> ScriptError
 IF IsNotEmpty(ScriptError) THEN
 SET errorMessage TO $'''Error entering zficlaims: %ScriptError%'''
 GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 # Enter the claim id
 Scripting.RunVBScript.RunVBScript VBScriptCode: $'''If Not IsObject(application) Then
 Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject(\"SAPGUI\")
 Set application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
End If
If Not IsObject(connection) Then
 Set connection = application.Children(0)
End If
If Not IsObject(session) Then
 Set session = connection.Children(0)
End If
If IsObject(WScript) Then
 WScript.ConnectObject session, \"on\"
 WScript.ConnectObject application, \"on\"
End If
session.findById(\"wnd[0]\").resizeWorkingPane 113,25,false
session.findById(\"wnd[0]/usr/txtS_CLAIM-LOW\").text = \"%row['ClaimID']%\"
session.findById(\"wnd[0]/usr/txtS_CLAIM-LOW\").setFocus
session.findById(\"wnd[0]/usr/txtS_CLAIM-LOW\").caretPosition = 9
session.findById(\"wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[8]\").press
''' ScriptError=> ScriptError
 IF IsNotEmpty(ScriptError) THEN
 # If there was an error doing that, then just jump to the END, and this means we couldn't even get into the claim
 SET errorMessage TO $'''Error going into the claim in SAP: %ScriptError%'''
 GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 SET rowCount TO 0
 # Now enter a loop and continue, so we can select all the relevant lines
 LOOP WHILE (ScriptError.Length) = (0)

FUNCTION 'General Approval' GLOBAL
 SET disputedAmount TO 0
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''SELECT COALESCE(SUM(u.FIN_CUSTDISP_AMT), 0) AS Total
 --c.EXT_KEY,
 --c.EXT_REF,
 --c.SALES_DIVISION_C,
 --c.SALES_ORDER_NO,
 -- c.SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C,
 -- c.INVOICE_NUM,
 -- c.CUSTOMER_NUM,
 -- c.FLOORING_CATEGORY,
 -- u.FIN_CUSTDISP_AMT
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Reporting.Finance/MHK_FI_CUSTOMER_CLAIMS_HC\" AS c
 LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"SCMG_T_CASE_ATTR\" AS s 
 ON c.\"CASE_GUID\" = s.\"CASE_GUID\" 
 LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"UDMCASEATTR00\" AS u 
 ON c.\"CASE_GUID\" = u.\"CASE_GUID\"
 WHERE 
 (
 c.\"FIN_KUNNR\" NOT IN (
\'0025024366\', \'0025024359\', \'0025024371\', \'0025024361\', \'0025024367\', 
\'0025024369\', \'0025024365\', \'0025024357\', \'0025024360\', \'0025024370\', 
\'0025024372\', \'0025024362\', \'0025024355\', \'0025024364\', \'0025024358\', 
\'0010211945\', \'0025024368\', \'0025024356\', \'0010419213\', \'0010422002\', 
\'10419213\', \'10422002\', \'10419541\', \'00101419541\', \'0010409288\', 
\'0010619009\', \'0010700668\', \'0010619002\', \'0010100668\', \'0010619000\', 
\'0010509289\', \'0010619003\', \'10619000\', \'10700668\', \'10700668\', 
\'10409288\', \'10100668\', \'0010513614\', \'0010210014\', \'0010429028\', 
\'0010522012\', \'0010399864\', \'0010413614\', \'0025012999\', \'0010414828\', 
\'0025045443\', \'0025013002\', \'0025013001\', \'0025013003\', \'0025013000\', 
\'0025013004\', \'0025013005\', \'0025013006\', \'0010536617\', \'0010436617\', 
\'0010522012\', \'10513614\', \'10210014\', \'10436617\', \'10399864\',

''' Timeout: 400 Result=> disputedAmount
 ON ERROR

 END
 SET disputedAmount TO disputedAmount[0]['TOTAL']
 Text.ToNumber Text: disputedAmount Number=> disputedAmount
 SET errorMessage TO $'''%''%'''
 CALL CalculateReturnPrice
 IF ((creditAmount < (disputedAmount - 5)) AND (creditAmount <> 0)) = True THEN
 IF NotStartsWith(row['ClaimID'], $'''DM''', True) THEN
 IF disputedAmount > 0 THEN
 SET errorMessage TO $'''Error, calculated credit amount $%creditAmount% is at least $5 less than customer disputed amount %disputedAmount%.'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 END
 END
 IF ((creditAmount > (disputedAmount + 5)) AND (creditAmount <> 0)) = True THEN
 IF NotStartsWith(row['ClaimID'], $'''DM''', True) THEN
 IF disputedAmount > 0 THEN
 SET errorMessage TO $'''Error, calculated credit amount $%creditAmount% is at least $5 more than customer disputed amount %disputedAmount%.'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 END
 END
 SET internalNote TO $'''\"Rate Charged - $%row['RateCharged']%\" + vbCr + \"Actual Rate - $%row['ActualRate']%\" + vbCr + \"The claim is approved because they were charged the wrong rate. Issue back $%creditAmount%\"'''
 SET customerNote TO $'''\"Dear Customer,\" + vbCr + \"The freight charge was applied incorrectly. We are processing a credit of $%creditAmount% to correct this error.\" + vbCr + vbCr + \"Thank you,\" + vbCr + \"Mohawk Claims\"'''
 SET permittedClaimComponents TO $'''05, 02, 15, 16, 17'''

FUNCTION CheckOutOfScopeClaims GLOBAL
 # Finds the reason why the claim is out of scope
 LOOP FOREACH row IN OutOfScopeClaims
 IF NotContains($'''B-BROADLOOM, C-CARPET TILE''', row['FLOORING_CATEGORY'], False) THEN
 IF Contains(row['SALES_DIVISION_C'], $'''82-MOHAWK COMMERCIAL''', False) THEN
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: $'''Commercial claim, in development''' List: OutOfScopeExceptions
 ELSE
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: $'''Not broadloom or carpet tile, out of scope''' List: OutOfScopeExceptions
 END
 ELSE IF Contains(row['CASE_TITLE'], $'''SPECIAL''', False) THEN
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: $'''Special goods''' List: OutOfScopeExceptions
 ELSE IF IsBlank(row['SALES_ORDER_NO']) THEN
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: $'''No Invoice Line''' List: OutOfScopeExceptions
 ELSE
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: $'''Out Of Scope''' List: OutOfScopeExceptions
 END
 END
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION UPS GLOBAL
 IF Contains(productTypes[index], $'''SAMPLE''', False) THEN
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, sample claim'''
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Samples exception'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 # query cams to get the notes
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=IBMDASQL.DataSource.1;Password=Mohawk19;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=RPA0029;Data Source=Mohawk1''' Connection=> SQLConnection
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: SQLConnection Statement: $'''SELECT listagg(trim(o2text), \', \')
FROM cams.opp020
WHERE o2ord# = %CamsOrders[index]%''' Timeout: 30 Result=> QueryResult3
 Database.Close Connection: SQLConnection
 Text.ParseText.RegexParse Text: QueryResult3[0][0] TextToFind: $'''\\$\\d+(.)?\\d+''' StartingPosition: 0 IgnoreCase: False Matches=> Matches
 # if we have multiple matches, throw exception
 IF Matches.Count > 1 THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Multiple quote prices found in notes'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 ELSE IF Matches.Count = 0 THEN
 Text.ParseText.RegexParse Text: QueryResult3[0][0] TextToFind: $'''\\$''' StartingPosition: 0 IgnoreCase: False Matches=> Matches
 IF Matches.Count = 0 THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, there is no quote price in notes'''
 SET actualRate TO 0
 EXIT FUNCTION
 ELSE IF Matches.Count > 1 THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Multiple quote prices found in notes'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 ELSE
 SET actualRate TO Matches[0]
 END
 ELSE
 SET actualRate TO Matches[0]
 END
 IF amountCharged = 0 THEN
 SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Could not find the code ZPFA from HANA'''
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 Text.Replace Text: actualRate TextToFind: $'''$''' IsRegEx: False IgnoreCase: False ReplaceWith: $'''%''%''' ActivateEscapeSequences: False Result=> actualRate
 IF amountCharged <= actualRate THEN
 SET curApproved TO 0
 SET curDenied TO 1
 SET note TO $'''Denied, they were charged the right amount'''
 ELSE
 SET curApproved TO 1
 SET curDenied TO 0
 SET note TO $'''Approved, they were charged more than the actualRate'''
 END
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION QueryCamsOutOfScope GLOBAL
 # This filters through out of scope claims, and finds the ones that we can process (UPS for now)
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=IBMDASQL.DataSource.1;Password=Mohawk19;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=RPA0029;Data Source=Mohawk1''' Connection=> SQLConnection
 # Populate the RPA sql table with all the claims seen, and the updated dates
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Driver={SQL Server}; Server=CCHGSQLP120LSTN; Database=MOHAWKRPA; UID=MohawkRPA; PWD=XnWMtmD794''' Connection=> RPASQL
 DateTime.GetCurrentDateTime.Local DateTimeFormat: DateTime.DateTimeFormat.DateAndTime CurrentDateTime=> curTime
 LOOP FOREACH Order IN OutOfScopeClaims
 DISABLE Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''USE [MOHAWKRPA];

INSERT INTO [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsSeen] (
 [OrderNumber],
 [Invoice],
 [Channel],
 [AccountNumber],
 [ClaimId],
 [CaseId],
 [TimeProcessed]
)
VALUES (
 \'%Order['SALES_ORDER_NO']%\',
 \'%Order['INVOICE_NUM']%\',
 \'%Order['SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C']%\',
 \'%Order['CUSTOMER_NUM']%\',
 \'%Order['EXT_REF']%\',
 \'%Order['EXT_KEY']%\',
 \'%curTime%\'
);''' Timeout: 30
 SET SAPNO TO Order['SALES_ORDER_NO']
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: SQLConnection Statement: $'''SELECT

 DISTINCT(o1ord#) as CAMSOrder, 

 o1line as CAMSLine, 

 O1PO#3 as SAPOrder, 

 O1NORD as SAPLine,

 O1MS10 as SAPDeliveryOrder,
 
 O1SVIA as ShipVia,
 
 O1SWHS as Warehouse

FROM cams.opp010
WHERE O1PO#3 IN (\'%SAPNO%\')
AND O1OTYP <> \'T\'
union

SELECT

 DISTINCT(o1ord#) as CAMSOrder, 

 o1line as CAMSLine, 

 O1PO#3 as SAPOrder, 

 O1NORD as SAPLine,

 O1MS10 as SAPDeliveryOrder,
 
 O1SVIA as ShipVia,
 
 O1SWHS as Warehouse

FROM cams.opp010s
WHERE O1PO#3 IN (\'%SAPNO%\')
AND O1OTYP <> \'T\'
LIMIT 10''' Timeout: 30 Result=> QueryResult2
 # If we got nothing from CAMS, don't do anything
 IF QueryResult2.RowsCount > 0 THEN
 IF StartsWith(QueryResult2[0]['SHIPVIA'], $'''UP''', True) THEN
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: SAPNO List: SalesOrderNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C'] List: SalesChannels
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_REF'] List: ClaimIDs
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['INVOICE_NUM'] List: Invoices
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['CUSTOMER_NUM'] List: accountNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['FLOORING_CATEGORY'] List: productTypes
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_KEY'] List: CaseIDs
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: 0 List: disputedAmounts
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['SALES_DIVISION_C'] List: Division
 LOOP FOREACH camno IN QueryResult2
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['CAMSORDER'] List: CamsOrders
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['SHIPVIA'] List: ShipVia
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['WAREHOUSE'] List: origins
 # Just get the first row in the query, and exit early
 EXIT LOOP
 END
 ELSE IF Contains(Order['SALES_DIVISION_C'], $'''82-MOHAWK COMMERCIAL''', False) THEN
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: SAPNO List: SalesOrderNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C'] List: SalesChannels
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_REF'] List: ClaimIDs
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['INVOICE_NUM'] List: Invoices
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['CUSTOMER_NUM'] List: accountNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['FLOORING_CATEGORY'] List: productTypes
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_KEY'] List: CaseIDs
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: 0 List: disputedAmounts
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['SALES_DIVISION_C'] List: Division
 LOOP FOREACH camno IN QueryResult2
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['CAMSORDER'] List: CamsOrders
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['SHIPVIA'] List: ShipVia
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['WAREHOUSE'] List: origins
 # Just get the first row in the query, and exit early
 EXIT LOOP
 END
 END
 END
 END
 Database.Close Connection: RPASQL
 Database.Close Connection: SQLConnection
END FUNCTION

FUNCTION SplitDeductions GLOBAL
 # have a check to see if we should use ZMFT or ZFST
 DISABLE Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=185222@Ccsd;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=N277093;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=N277093;PWD=185222@Ccsd;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
 SET DMIndex TO 0
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA
SELECT 
 COUNT(c.EXT_KEY)
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Reporting.Finance/MHK_FI_CUSTOMER_CLAIMS_HC\" AS c
 LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"SCMG_T_CASE_ATTR\" AS s 
 ON c.\"CASE_GUID\" = s.\"CASE_GUID\" 
 LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"UDMCASEATTR00\" AS u 
 ON c.\"CASE_GUID\" = u.\"CASE_GUID\"
 WHERE c.\"EXT_REF\" = \'%row['ClaimID']%\'''' Timeout: 400 Result=> AllLines
 ON ERROR

 END
 IF AllLines[0][0] > 1 THEN
 SET errorMessage TO $'''Deduction claim already split'''
 GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''-- GA
SELECT DISTINCT
 i1.VBELN AS InvoiceNumber,
 i2.POSNR AS InvoiceItem,
 o2.VBELN AS SalesOrder,
 o2.POSNR AS SalesOrderItem,
 details.SPART AS Division,
 details.INCO1 AS IncoTerms,
 details.INCO2_L AS IncoTerms1,
 details.KONDA AS PriceGroup,
 p.KSCHL AS ConditionType,
 p.KWERT AS ConditionValue,
 p.KBETR AS ConditionRate,
 p.KPEIN AS PricingUnit,
 p.KMEIN AS Measure
FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRK\" AS i1
INNER JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\" AS i2
 ON i1.VBELN = i2.VBELN
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBAP\" AS o2
 ON i2.AUBEL = o2.VBELN AND i2.AUPOS = o2.POSNR
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p.KNUMV
 AND o2.POSNR = p.KPOSN
LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"VBRK\" AS details
 ON i1.\"VBELN\" = details.\"VBELN\"
WHERE i1.VBELN = \'%row['Invoice']%\'
AND p.KSCHL IN (\'%row['Code']%\', \'ZFCH\')
AND p.KWERT > 0
ORDER BY i2.POSNR, p.KSCHL DESC;''' Timeout: 400 Result=> AllLines
 ON ERROR

 END
 # If there is more than 1 line, then it throws an exception. If not then it continues
 IF AllLines.RowsCount > 2 THEN
 IF AllLines.RowsCount > 50 THEN
 SET errorMessage TO $'''More than 50 invoice lines in deduction'''
 GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 CALL 'Split More Than 1'
 EXIT FUNCTION
 DISABLE SET errorMessage TO $'''More than 1 invoice line in deduction'''
 DISABLE GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 IF AllLines.RowsCount = 2 THEN
 IF AllLines[1]['CONDITIONTYPE'] <> $'''ZFCH''' THEN
 DISABLE SET errorMessage TO $'''More than 1 invoice line in deduction'''
 DISABLE GOTO 'ERROR'
 CALL 'Split More Than 1'
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 END
 DISABLE Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''SELECT DISTINCT
 i1.VBELN AS InvoiceNumber,
 i2.POSNR AS InvoiceItem,
 o2.VBELN AS SalesOrder,
 o2.POSNR AS SalesOrderItem,
 details.SPART AS Division,
 details.INCO1 AS IncoTerms,
 details.INCO2_L AS IncoTerms1,
 details.KONDA AS PriceGroup,
 p.KSCHL AS ConditionType,
 p.KWERT AS ConditionValue,
 p.KBETR AS ConditionRate,
 p.KPEIN AS PricingUnit,
 p.KMEIN AS Measure
FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRK\" AS i1
INNER JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\" AS i2
 ON i1.VBELN = i2.VBELN
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBAP\" AS o2
 ON i2.AUBEL = o2.VBELN AND i2.AUPOS = o2.POSNR
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p.KNUMV
 AND o2.POSNR = p.KPOSN
LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"VBRK\" AS details
 ON i1.\"VBELN\" = details.\"VBELN\"
WHERE i1.VBELN = \'9502607273\'
AND p.KSCHL IN (\'%row['Code']%\', \'ZFCH\')
ORDER BY i2.POSNR, p.KSCHL DESC;''' Timeout: 400 Result=> AllLines
ON ERROR

END
 # Enter ZFIClaims
 IF StartsWith(row['ShipVia'], $'''UP''', False) THEN
 DISABLE SET errorMessage TO $'''Could not find the code ZPFA from HANA'''
 DISABLE SET exceptionMessage TO $'''Could not find the code ZPFA from HANA'''
 DISABLE GOTO 'ERROR'
 SET invoice TO row['Invoice']
 CALL FindCodeManually
 IF exceptionMessage.Length >= 1 THEN
 GOTO 'ERROR'
 END
 Scripting.RunVBScript.RunVBScript VBScriptCode: $'''If Not IsObject(application) Then
 Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject(\"SAPGUI\")
 Set application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
End If
If Not IsObject(connection) Then
 Set connection = application.Children(0)
End If

FUNCTION SQL_UpdateException GLOBAL
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''update [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsReports]
set Exceptions =\'%exceptionMessage%\'
where ID = \'%row['ID']%\'''' Timeout: 30
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION CalculateLinePrice GLOBAL
 /# should be changed
=================#/
 DISABLE SET amountCharged TO 0.50
 SET amountCharged TO row['RateCharged']
 Text.ToNumber Text: amountCharged Number=> amountCharged
 IF amountCharged = 0 THEN
 SET creditAmount TO 0
 EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 DISABLE SET actualRate TO 0.50
 SET actualRate TO row['ActualRate']
 Text.ToNumber Text: actualRate Number=> actualRate
 SET distance TO AllLines[DMIndex]['CONDITIONVALUE'] / amountCharged
 SET creditAmount TO distance * actualRate
 SET creditAmount TO AllLines[DMIndex]['CONDITIONVALUE'] - creditAmount
 Variables.TruncateNumber.RoundNumber Number: creditAmount DecimalPlaces: 2 Result=> creditAmount
END FUNCTION
FUNCTION GoThroughDeductions GLOBAL
 DISABLE Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=MSDASQL.1;Password=185222@Ccsd;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=N277093;Extended Properties=\"SERVERNODE={achgaohp151.na.int.grp:32541};DSN=HANADB1;UID=N277093;PWD=185222@Ccsd;\"''' Connection=> HANAConnection
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''SELECT 
 EXT_KEY,
 EXT_REF,
 SALES_DIVISION_C,
 SALES_ORDER_NO,
 SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C,
 INVOICE_NUM,
 CUSTOMER_NUM,
 FLOORING_CATEGORY,
 FIN_CUSTDISP_AMT
 FROM (
 SELECT 
 c.EXT_KEY,
 c.EXT_REF,
 c.SALES_DIVISION_C,
 c.SALES_ORDER_NO,
 c.SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C,
 c.INVOICE_NUM,
 c.CUSTOMER_NUM,
 c.FLOORING_CATEGORY,
 u.FIN_CUSTDISP_AMT,
 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
 PARTITION BY c.EXT_REF
 ORDER BY c.SALES_ORDER_NO DESC
 ) AS rn
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Reporting.Finance/MHK_FI_CUSTOMER_CLAIMS_HC\" AS c
 LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"SCMG_T_CASE_ATTR\" AS s 
 ON c.\"CASE_GUID\" = s.\"CASE_GUID\" 
 LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"UDMCASEATTR00\" AS u 
 ON c.\"CASE_GUID\" = u.\"CASE_GUID\"
 WHERE 
 (
 c.\"FIN_KUNNR\" NOT IN (
\'0025024366\', \'0025024359\', \'0025024371\', \'0025024361\', \'0025024367\', 
\'0025024369\', \'0025024365\', \'0025024357\', \'0025024360\', \'0025024370\', 
\'0025024372\', \'0025024362\', \'0025024355\', \'0025024364\', \'0025024358\',

 DISABLE Database.Close Connection: HANAConnection
 CALL InitializeVariables
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Provider=IBMDASQL.DataSource.1;Password=Mohawk19;Persist Security Info=True;User ID=RPA0029;Data Source=Mohawk1''' Connection=> SQLConnection
 # Populate the RPA sql table with all the claims seen, and the updated dates
 Database.Connect ConnectionString: $'''Driver={SQL Server}; Server=CCHGSQLP120LSTN; Database=MOHAWKRPA; UID=MohawkRPA; PWD=XnWMtmD794''' Connection=> RPASQL
 DateTime.GetCurrentDateTime.Local DateTimeFormat: DateTime.DateTimeFormat.DateAndTime CurrentDateTime=> curTime
 LOOP FOREACH Order IN QueryResult
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: RPASQL Statement: $'''USE [MOHAWKRPA];

INSERT INTO [MOHAWKRPA].[dbo].[EndToEndFreightClaimsSeen] (
 [OrderNumber],
 [Invoice],
 [Channel],
 [AccountNumber],
 [ClaimId],
 [CaseId],
 [TimeProcessed]
)
VALUES (
 \'%Order['SALES_ORDER_NO']%\',
 \'%Order['INVOICE_NUM']%\',
 \'%Order['SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C']%\',
 \'%Order['CUSTOMER_NUM']%\',
 \'%Order['EXT_REF']%\',
 \'%Order['EXT_KEY']%\',
 \'%curTime%\'
);''' Timeout: 30
 SET SAPNO TO Order['SALES_ORDER_NO']
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: SQLConnection Statement: $'''SELECT

 DISTINCT(o1ord#) as CAMSOrder, 

 o1line as CAMSLine, 

 O1PO#3 as SAPOrder, 

 O1NORD as SAPLine,

 O1MS10 as SAPDeliveryOrder,
 
 O1SVIA as ShipVia,
 
 O1SWHS as Warehouse

FROM cams.opp010
WHERE O1PO#3 IN (\'%SAPNO%\')
AND O1OTYP <> \'T\'
union

SELECT

 DISTINCT(o1ord#) as CAMSOrder, 

 o1line as CAMSLine, 

 O1PO#3 as SAPOrder, 

 O1NORD as SAPLine,

 O1MS10 as SAPDeliveryOrder,
 
 O1SVIA as ShipVia,
 
 O1SWHS as Warehouse

FROM cams.opp010s
WHERE O1PO#3 IN (\'%SAPNO%\')
AND O1OTYP <> \'T\'
LIMIT 10''' Timeout: 30 Result=> QueryResult2
 # If we got nothing from CAMS, then we add the OrderNumber, claim number, CaseId and Invoice number to their respective lists
 IF QueryResult2.RowsCount = 0 THEN
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C'] List: NoCamsChannels
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_REF'] List: NoCamsClaimIDs
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: SAPNO List: NoCamsOrderNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['INVOICE_NUM'] List: NoCamsInvoices
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['CUSTOMER_NUM'] List: NoCamsAccountNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['FLOORING_CATEGORY'] List: NoCamsProductTypes
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_KEY'] List: NoCamsCaseIDs
 ELSE
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: SAPNO List: SalesOrderNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C'] List: SalesChannels
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_REF'] List: ClaimIDs
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['INVOICE_NUM'] List: Invoices
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['CUSTOMER_NUM'] List: accountNumbers
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['FLOORING_CATEGORY'] List: productTypes
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['EXT_KEY'] List: CaseIDs
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: Order['FIN_CUSTDISP_AMT'] List: disputedAmounts
 LOOP FOREACH camno IN QueryResult2
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['CAMSORDER'] List: CamsOrders
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['SHIPVIA'] List: ShipVia
 Variables.AddItemToList Item: camno['WAREHOUSE'] List: origins
 # Just get the first row in the query, and exit early
 EXIT LOOP
 END
 END
 END
 Database.Close Connection: RPASQL
 Database.Close Connection: SQLConnection
END FUNCTION

FUNCTION 'Samples Approval' GLOBAL
 SET disputedAmount TO 0
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''SELECT COALESCE(SUM(u.FIN_CUSTDISP_AMT), 0) AS Total
 --c.EXT_KEY,
 --c.EXT_REF,
 --c.SALES_DIVISION_C,
 --c.SALES_ORDER_NO,
 -- c.SALES_CHANNEL_CD_C,
 -- c.INVOICE_NUM,
 -- c.CUSTOMER_NUM,
 -- c.FLOORING_CATEGORY,
 -- u.FIN_CUSTDISP_AMT
 FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Reporting.Finance/MHK_FI_CUSTOMER_CLAIMS_HC\" AS c
 LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"SCMG_T_CASE_ATTR\" AS s 
 ON c.\"CASE_GUID\" = s.\"CASE_GUID\" 
 LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"UDMCASEATTR00\" AS u 
 ON c.\"CASE_GUID\" = u.\"CASE_GUID\"
 WHERE 
 (
 c.\"FIN_KUNNR\" NOT IN (
\'0025024366\', \'0025024359\', \'0025024371\', \'0025024361\', \'0025024367\', 
\'0025024369\', \'0025024365\', \'0025024357\', \'0025024360\', \'0025024370\', 
\'0025024372\', \'0025024362\', \'0025024355\', \'0025024364\', \'0025024358\', 
\'0010211945\', \'0025024368\', \'0025024356\', \'0010419213\', \'0010422002\', 
\'10419213\', \'10422002\', \'10419541\', \'00101419541\', \'0010409288\', 
\'0010619009\', \'0010700668\', \'0010619002\', \'0010100668\', \'0010619000\', 
\'0010509289\', \'0010619003\', \'10619000\', \'10700668\', \'10700668\', 
\'10409288\', \'10100668\', \'0010513614\', \'0010210014\', \'0010429028\', 
\'0010522012\', \'0010399864\', \'0010413614\', \'0025012999\', \'0010414828\', 
\'0025045443\', \'0025013002\', \'0025013001\', \'0025013003\', \'0025013000\', 
\'0025013004\', \'0025013005\', \'0025013006\', \'0010536617\', \'0010436617\', 
\'0010522012\', \'10513614\', \'10210014\', \'10436617\', \'10399864\', 
\'10522012\', \'10413614\', \'0010101718\', \'0010422953\', \'0010409607\', 
\'0010430300\', \'10422953\', \'10430300\', \'0010519000\', \'0010519008\', 
\'0010419003\', \'0010519001\', \'0010519017\', \'0010519005\', \'0010519003\', 
\'0010258191\', \'0010419002\', \'0010519004\', \'0010519002\', \'0010419001\', 
\'0010159922\', \'0010110666\', \'0010419000\', \'0010519014\', \'10101503\', 
\'10519003\', \'10519000\', \'10519005\', \'10519004\', \'10110666\', \'10519017\', 
\'10519001\', \'10419001\', \'10519008\', \'10419003\', \'0010519013\', 
\'10519001\', \'10419000\', \'0010519016\', \'10519016\', \'10101404\', \'0010101404\', \'53908\'
 )
AND LEFT(u.\"ZZTMINVOICE\", 3) <> \'10-\'
 )
AND c.\"EXT_REF\" IN (\'%row['ClaimID']%\')
''' Timeout: 400 Result=> disputedAmount
 ON ERROR

 END
 SET disputedAmount TO disputedAmount[0]['TOTAL']
 Text.ToNumber Text: disputedAmount Number=> disputedAmount
 SET errorMessage TO $'''%''%'''
 CALL 'Calculate Sample Return Price'
 IF ((creditAmount < (disputedAmount - 5)) AND (creditAmount <> 0)) = True THEN
 IF NotStartsWith(row['ClaimID'], $'''DM''', True) THEN
 IF disputedAmount > 0 THEN
 SET needsCheck TO 1
 DISABLE SET errorMessage TO $'''Error, calculated credit amount $%creditAmount% is at least $5 less than customer disputed amount %disputedAmount%.'''
 DISABLE EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 END
 END
 IF ((creditAmount > (disputedAmount + 5)) AND (creditAmount <> 0)) = True THEN
 IF NotStartsWith(row['ClaimID'], $'''DM''', True) THEN
 IF disputedAmount > 0 THEN
 SET needsCheck TO 1
 DISABLE SET errorMessage TO $'''Error, calculated credit amount $%creditAmount% is at least $5 more than customer disputed amount %disputedAmount%.'''
 DISABLE EXIT FUNCTION
 END
 END
 END
 SET internalNote TO $'''\"Approved, samples claim\"'''
 SET customerNote TO $'''\"Dear Customer,\" + vbCr + \"The freight charge was applied incorrectly. We are processing a credit of $%creditAmount% to correct this error.\" + vbCr + vbCr + \"Thank you,\" + vbCr + \"Mohawk Claims\"'''
 SET permittedClaimComponents TO $'''05, 02, 15, 16, 17'''
 System.TerminateProcess.TerminateProcessByName ProcessName: $'''saplogon'''
 ON ERROR

 END
 WAIT 5
 CALL SAP_Login
 WAIT 5
 # Enter ZFIClaims
 Scripting.RunVBScript.RunVBScript VBScriptCode: $'''If Not IsObject(application) Then
 Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject(\"SAPGUI\")
 Set application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
End If
If Not IsObject(connection) Then
 Set connection = application.Children(0)
End If
If Not IsObject(session) Then
 Set session = connection.Children(0)
End If
If IsObject(WScript) Then
 WScript.ConnectObject session, \"on\"
 WScript.ConnectObject application, \"on\"

FUNCTION 'Calculate Sample Return Price' GLOBAL
 Database.ExecuteSqlStatement.Execute Connection: HANAConnection Statement: $'''SELECT

 -- Combined Freight: ZFRT + ZFST + ZDRT
 SUM(COALESCE(p_freight.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zfsm.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zdrt.KWERT, 0) + COALESCE(p_zfch.KWERT, 0)) AS Total

 
FROM \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRK\" AS i1
INNER JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBRP\" AS i2
 ON i1.VBELN = i2.VBELN
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_LIKP\" AS d1
 ON i2.VGBEL = d1.VBELN
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_VBAP\" AS o2
 ON i2.AUBEL = o2.VBELN AND i2.AUPOS = o2.POSNR
 
-- Pricing Condition Joins
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_freight
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_freight.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_freight.KPOSN AND p_freight.KSCHL = \'ZFRT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfst
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfst.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfst.KPOSN AND p_zfst.KSCHL = \'ZFST\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zdrt
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zdrt.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zdrt.KPOSN AND p_zdrt.KSCHL = \'ZDRT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_po
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_po.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_po.KPOSN AND p_po.KSCHL = \'ZFCH\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zmft
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zmft.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zmft.KPOSN AND p_zmft.KSCHL = \'ZMFT\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zlgc
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zlgc.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zlgc.KPOSN AND p_zlgc.KSCHL = \'ZLGC\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zftl
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zftl.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zftl.KPOSN AND p_zftl.KSCHL = \'ZFTL\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfsm
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfsm.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfsm.KPOSN AND p_zfsm.KSCHL = \'ZFSM\'
 
LEFT JOIN \"_SYS_BIC\".\"MHK_FNA.Base.SalesOrders/MHK_BVCU_SO_PRCD_ELEMENTS\" AS p_zfch
 ON o2.KNUMV_ANA = p_zfch.KNUMV AND o2.POSNR = p_zfch.KPOSN AND p_zfch.KSCHL = \'ZFCH\'
 

LEFT JOIN \"PS5_TO_AIP\".\"VBRK\" AS details ON i1.\"VBELN\" = details.\"VBELN\"
WHERE i1.VBELN = %row['Invoice']%
''' Timeout: 30 Result=> totalCharged
 SET creditAmount TO totalCharged[0]['TOTAL']
 CALL FindCodeFromHeader
 SET creditAmount TO amountCharged + creditAmount
 Variables.TruncateNumber.RoundNumber Number: creditAmount DecimalPlaces: 2 Result=> creditAmount
END FUNCTION

 IF Contains(codeOutput, $'''ZPFA''', True) THEN
 Scripting.RunVBScript.RunVBScript VBScriptCode: $'''If Not IsObject(application) Then

If IsObject(WScript) Then
 WScript.ConnectObject session, \"on\"
 WScript.ConnectObject application, \"on\"
End If
session.findById(\"wnd[0]\").resizeWorkingPane 113,34,false
session.findById(\"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSTRIP_OVERVIEW/tabpPFKO/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPLV69A:6201/tblSAPLV69ATCTRL_KONDITIONEN/txtKOMV-KWERT[7,%columnIndex%]\").setFocus
a = session.findById(\"wnd[0]/usr/tabsTABSTRIP_OVERVIEW/tabpPFKO/ssubSUBSCREEN_BODY:SAPLV69A:6201/tblSAPLV69ATCTRL_KONDITIONEN/txtKOMV-KWERT[7,%columnIndex%]\").Text

wscript.echo a''' ScriptOutput=> amountCharged ScriptError=> enterSalesNoError
 IF IsNotEmpty(enterSalesNoError) THEN

 END

 END
